1→# 작업 진행 내역
     2→
     3→## 2025-12-31 08:29 (SavePallet_OP10 함수 수정)
     4→
     5→### 작업 내용
     6→- `SavePallet_OP10` 함수 로직 수정
     7→- `Table_Pallet`의 `PalletID1`, `PalletID2` 컬럼 기반으로 조회/저장
     8→
     9→### 변경 파일
    10→
    11→#### FrmMain.vb
    12→- `SavePallet_OP10()`: 조회 조건 수정
    13→  - `StrRFID1`이 `PalletID1` 또는 `PalletID2`와 일치
    14→  - `StrRFID2`가 `PalletID1` 또는 `PalletID2`와 일치
    15→  - 일치하면 `SerialNumber` 업데이트, 없으면 신규 추가
    16→- `GetRfid` → `GetRfid1`으로 변경 (변수 분리에 따른 수정)
    17→  - `LoadPallet(GetRfid1)`
    18→  - `SavePallet(GetRfid1, ...)`
    19→
    20→### 빌드
    21→- 빌드 성공 확인
    22→
    23→---
    24→
    25→## 2025-12-31 08:17 (RFID 변수 분리 - 1/2 독립화)
    26→
    27→### 작업 내용
    28→- RFID1/RFID2 변수 완전 분리 (기존 변수명 끝에 1 추가)
    29→- 각 RFID 안테나가 독립적으로 동작하도록 수정
    30→
    31→### 변경 파일
    32→
    33→#### FrmMain.vb
    34→- 변수 선언 분리:
    35→  - `RfidStep` → `RfidStep1`
    36→  - `RfidStep2` (기존 유지)
    37→  - `FLagRfid` → `FLagRfid1`, `FLagRfid2`
    38→  - `RfidCount` → `RfidCount1`, `RfidCount2`
    39→  - `RfidReadCount` → `RfidReadCount1`, `RfidReadCount2`
    40→- TmrWork_Tick에서 RFID1/RFID2 읽기 로직 분리
    41→- ThreadRfidRecv(): `RfidStep1 = 0` 으로 수정
    42→- ThreadRfidRecv2(): `RfidStep2 = 0` 추가
    43→- 초기화 시 srcLbRFID2.Text = "" 추가
    44→
    45→### 빌드
    46→- 빌드 성공 확인
    47→
    48→---
    49→
    50→## 2025-12-31 08:09 (FrmSet2 PropertyGrid 방식으로 재구성)
    51→
    52→### 작업 내용
    53→- FrmSet의 60개 이상 개별 컨트롤 → PropertyGrid 1개로 대체
    54→- 카테고리별 그룹핑, 드롭다운 자동 지원
    55→
    56→### 생성 파일
    57→
    58→#### SettingsData.vb
    59→- 모든 설정 항목을 속성으로 정의
    60→- `[Category]`, `[DisplayName]`, `[Description]` 어트리뷰트 적용
    61→- TypeConverter로 드롭다운 구현:
    62→  - `ComPortConverter`: COM1~15, Disabled
    63→  - `ToolMakerConverter`: ESTIC RS232, ATLAS RS232, HANTAS
    64→  - `StageTypeConverter`: START, LINE, END
    65→  - `LaserModelConverter`: IL-30, IL-65, IL-100, IL-300, IL-600
    66→  - `LaserNumConverter`: 1~4
    67→- `LoadFromModule()`: Module1 전역변수 → 속성으로 로드
    68→- `SaveToModule()`: 속성 → Module1 전역변수로 저장
    69→
    70→#### FrmSet2.Designer.vb
    71→- PropertyGrid1: 설정 표시/편집
    72→- BtnSave, BtnClose: 저장/닫기
    73→- BtnConnTest: DB 연결 테스트
    74→- BtnLaserCheck: 레이저 설정 화면 (FrmLaser)
    75→
    76→#### FrmSet2.vb
    77→- Form_Load에서 SettingsData 생성 및 PropertyGrid 바인딩
    78→- BtnSave_Click에서 SaveToModule() + SaveSetData()
    79→
    80→### 카테고리 구성
    81→| Category | 항목 |
    82→|----------|------|
    83→| 1. 스캐너/프린터 | Scanner1, Scanner2, Printer |
    84→| 2. 공구 (Tool) | Tool1~4 Port, Tool1~4 Maker |
    85→| 3. IO/PLC | IoPort, PLC IP, IN/OUT 주소, ResetPort |
    86→| 4. 센서 | Resist1~2, RFID1~2, Angle, Cell, Indicator1~2, ToPc |
    87→| 5. 레이저 | Laser1~3 Port/Num/Model |
    88→| 6. 시스템 | LineName, Password, GridHeight, StageType |
    89→| 7. 서버 연동 | ServerUse, ConnectionString, TableName, ColumnTitle |
    90→| 8. 작업표준서 | WorkStandardUse, WorkStandardPos |
    91→
    92→### 사용법
    93→- 기존 FrmSet 대신 FrmSet2 호출
    94→- PropertyGrid에서 항목 클릭 후 드롭다운/입력으로 편집
    95→- 저장 버튼 클릭 시 DB에 저장
    96→
    97→### 빌드
    98→- 빌드 성공 확인
    99→
   100→---
   101→
   102→## 2025-12-31 08:01 (RFID2 안테나 추가)
   103→
   104→### 작업 내용
   105→- RFID 안테나 2개 지원 (기존 1개 → 2개)
   106→- `PortNumberRfid` → `PortNumberRfid1`, `PortNumberRfid2`로 분리
   107→- DB 컬럼 자동 생성 (RfidPort2)
   108→- FrmSet에 ComboBoxRfid2 바인딩
   109→- FrmMain에 srcLbRFID2 표시 및 CwlbRFID2 통신 상태 표시
   110→
   111→### 변경 파일
   112→
   113→#### Module1.vb
   114→- `PortNumberRfid` → `PortNumberRfid1`, `PortNumberRfid2` 변수 분리
   115→- `LoadSetData()`: RfidPort2 컬럼 없으면 자동 생성 (ALTER TABLE)
   116→- `LoadSetData()`: RfidPort2 값 로드 (Try-Catch로 컬럼 없을 때 대비)
   117→- `SaveSetData()`: RfidPort2 저장
   118→
   119→#### FrmSet.vb
   120→- ComboBoxRfid2 Items 추가 (COM1~15, Disabled)
   121→- Load 시 PortNumberRfid2 바인딩
   122→- Save 시 PortNumberRfid2 저장
   123→
   124→#### FrmMain.Designer.vb
   125→- `SerialRfid2` SerialPort 추가
   126→- `CwlbRFID2` 통신 상태 라벨 추가 (위치: 477, 893)
   127→
   128→#### FrmMain.vb
   129→- `TrdRfid2` 스레드 변수 추가
   130→- `PortOpen(SerialRfid2, PortNumberRfid2, CwlbRFID2, 9600)` 추가
   131→- `ReadRFiD2()` 함수 추가 - RFID2 읽기 명령
   132→- `ResetRFiD2()` 함수 추가 - RFID2 리셋 명령
   133→- `ThreadRfidRecv2()` 함수 추가 - RFID2 수신 스레드, srcLbRFID2에 표시
   134→- Form_Load에 RFID2 스레드 시작 코드 추가
   135→
   136→### 사용법
   137→- FrmSet에서 ComboBoxRfid2에 COM 포트 설정 (Disabled = 미사용)
   138→- 프로그램 시작 시 DB에 RfidPort2 컬럼 자동 생성
   139→- srcLbRFID1: 첫 번째 RFID 안테나 읽은 값
   140→- srcLbRFID2: 두 번째 RFID 안테나 읽은 값
   141→
   142→### 빌드
   143→- 빌드 성공 확인
   144→
   145→---
   146→
   147→## 2025-01-27 (Pset 테스트 기능 추가)
   148→
   149→### 작업 내용
   150→- Handy2000 Open Protocol_030.pdf 문서를 참고하여 Pset 테스트 기능 추가
   151→- ClassHandy2000.vb 클래스에 Pset 관련 메서드 및 이벤트 추가
   152→
   153→### 추가된 기능
   154→
   155→#### Public API 메서드
   156→1. `RequestPsetNumbers()` - MID 0010: Pset 번호 목록 요청
   157→2. `RequestPsetData(psetNumber)` - MID 0012: 특정 Pset 데이터 요청
   158→3. `SubscribePsetSelected()` - MID 0014: Pset 선택 상태 구독
   159→4. `AckPsetSelected()` - MID 0016: Pset 선택 ACK
   160→5. `UnsubscribePsetSelected()` - MID 0017: Pset 선택 구독 해제
   161→6. `SelectPset(psetNumber)` - MID 0018: Pset 선택
   162→7. `SetPsetBatchSize(psetNumber, batchSize)` - MID 0019: Pset 배치 사이즈 설정
   163→8. `ResetPsetBatchSize(psetNumber)` - MID 0020: Pset 배치 사이즈 리셋
   164→
   165→#### 이벤트
   166→1. `PsetNumbersReceived(numbers As List(Of Integer))` - Pset 번호 목록 수신
   167→2. `PsetDataReceived(...)` - Pset 데이터 수신
   168→3. `PsetSelected(psetNumber, lastChangeDate, raw)` - Pset 선택 알림
   169→
   170→#### 핸들러
   171→1. `HandleMid0011()` - MID 0011 (Pset 번호 목록 응답) 처리
   172→2. `HandleMid0013()` - MID 0013 (Pset 데이터 응답) 처리
   173→3. `HandleMid0015()` - MID 0015 (Pset 선택 알림) 처리
   174→4. `HandleMid0004()` - MID 0004 (Command Error) 처리
   175→
   176→### 사용 예시
   177→```vb
   178→' Pset 번호 목록 조회
   179→client.RequestPsetNumbers()
   180→
   181→' 특정 Pset 데이터 조회
   182→client.RequestPsetData(1)
   183→
   184→' Pset 선택
   185→client.SelectPset(1)
   186→
   187→' Pset 선택 상태 구독
   188→client.SubscribePsetSelected()
   189→
   190→' Pset 배치 사이즈 설정
   191→client.SetPsetBatchSize(1, 10)
   192→```
   193→
   194→### 참고
   195→- Pset 번호 범위: 000-099
   196→- 배치 사이즈 범위: 00-99
   197→- 모든 Pset 관련 명령은 MID 0005 (Command Accepted) 또는 MID 0004 (Command Error)로 응답
   198→
   199→---
   200→
   201→## 2025-12-23 17:05 (FrmPart 컬럼 추가 - 체크박스/콤보박스)
   202→
   203→### 작업 내용
   204→- FrmPart에 type_Lsupt, type_MONITOR, type_HeadRest, type_FREST 컬럼 추가
   205→- bit 타입 → CheckBox, nvarchar → ComboBox 적용
   206→
   207→### 변경 파일
   208→- **FrmPart.vb**
   209→  - `InitGrid()`: 4개 컬럼 추가
   210→    - type_Lsupt: ComboBox (빈값, 2_CELL, 7_CELL, 15_CELL)
   211→    - type_MONITOR: CheckBox
   212→    - type_HeadRest: CheckBox
   213→    - type_FREST: CheckBox
   214→  - `LoadGrid()`: SELECT 쿼리에 해당 필드 추가, BitToBool 변환
   215→  - `SaveGrid()`: UPDATE 시 해당 필드 저장
   216→  - `BitToBool()`: bit → Boolean 변환 함수 추가
   217→  - `DgvParts_DataError()`: 콤보박스 값 오류 방지 핸들러 추가
   218→
   219→### 추가 컬럼 (DB 기준)
   220→| 컬럼명 | 표시명 | 타입 | UI |
   221→|--------|--------|------|-----|
   222→| type_Lsupt | Lsupt | nvarchar(255) | ComboBox |
   223→| type_MONITOR | MONITOR | bit | CheckBox |
   224→| type_HeadRest | HeadRest | bit | CheckBox |
   225→| type_FREST | FREST | bit | CheckBox |
   226→
   227→---
   228→
   229→## 2025-12-23 16:43 (FrmMain2 신규 생성)
   230→
   231→### 작업 내용
   232→- FrmMain2 폼 신규 작성 (FlexCell Grid1 → DataGridView 대체)
   233→- FrmMain 디자인과 동일한 레이아웃 유지

   242→### 주요 변경사항
   243→- `FlexCell.Grid1` → `System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView` (DgvMain)
   244→- 폼 크기: 1914x1051

   247→
   248→### 빌드

   251→---
   252→

   255→### 작업 내용
   256→1. **순번 이동 시 자동저장 제거**: SwapRows에서 SaveGrid/LoadGrid 호출 제거

## 2025-01-27 (Pset 테스트 기능 추가)

### 작업 내용
- Handy2000 Open Protocol_030.pdf 문서를 참고하여 Pset 테스트 기능 추가
- ClassHandy2000.vb 클래스에 Pset 관련 메서드 및 이벤트 추가

### 추가된 기능

#### Public API 메서드
1. `RequestPsetNumbers()` - MID 0010: Pset 번호 목록 요청
2. `RequestPsetData(psetNumber)` - MID 0012: 특정 Pset 데이터 요청
3. `SubscribePsetSelected()` - MID 0014: Pset 선택 상태 구독
4. `AckPsetSelected()` - MID 0016: Pset 선택 ACK
5. `UnsubscribePsetSelected()` - MID 0017: Pset 선택 구독 해제
6. `SelectPset(psetNumber)` - MID 0018: Pset 선택
7. `SetPsetBatchSize(psetNumber, batchSize)` - MID 0019: Pset 배치 사이즈 설정
8. `ResetPsetBatchSize(psetNumber)` - MID 0020: Pset 배치 사이즈 리셋

#### 이벤트
1. `PsetNumbersReceived(numbers As List(Of Integer))` - Pset 번호 목록 수신
2. `PsetDataReceived(...)` - Pset 데이터 수신
3. `PsetSelected(psetNumber, lastChangeDate, raw)` - Pset 선택 알림

#### 핸들러
1. `HandleMid0011()` - MID 0011 (Pset 번호 목록 응답) 처리
2. `HandleMid0013()` - MID 0013 (Pset 데이터 응답) 처리
3. `HandleMid0015()` - MID 0015 (Pset 선택 알림) 처리
4. `HandleMid0004()` - MID 0004 (Command Error) 처리

### 사용 예시
```vb
' Pset 번호 목록 조회
client.RequestPsetNumbers()

' 특정 Pset 데이터 조회
client.RequestPsetData(1)

' Pset 선택
client.SelectPset(1)

' Pset 선택 상태 구독
client.SubscribePsetSelected()

' Pset 배치 사이즈 설정
client.SetPsetBatchSize(1, 10)
```

### 참고
- Pset 번호 범위: 000-099
- 배치 사이즈 범위: 00-99
- 모든 Pset 관련 명령은 MID 0005 (Command Accepted) 또는 MID 0004 (Command Error)로 응답

## 2025-01-27 (FrmMain Pset 버튼 이벤트 핸들러 추가)

### 추가된 기능

#### 버튼 이벤트 핸들러
1. `btnTool1P1_Click()` - Tool1에 Pset 1 선택
2. `btnTool1P2_Click()` - Tool1에 Pset 2 선택
3. `btnTool2P1_Click()` - Tool2에 Pset 1 선택
4. `btnTool2P2_Click()` - Tool2에 Pset 2 선택

### 구현 내용
- 각 버튼 클릭 시 `_cliTools` 배열에서 해당 툴의 Handy2000Client40Vb 인스턴스 확인
- 시리얼 포트 연결 상태 확인 (SerialTool1, SerialTool2)
- `SelectPset()` 메서드를 통해 Pset 선택 명령 전송
- 오류 발생 시 상세한 로그 기록 (에러 메시지 및 StackTrace)

### 오류 처리
- 클라이언트 미시작 상태 확인
- 시리얼 포트 미연결 상태 확인
- 예외 발생 시 Appendlog를 통한 상세 로그 기록

## 2025-12-23 21:22 (FrmSeq2 저장 시 ColumnCheck 자동 실행 / FrmMain 수정)

### 작업 내용

#### FrmSeq2.vb
- 저장 시 ColumnCheck 자동 실행 (에러 무시)
- `AutoColumnCheck()` 함수 추가 - Try-Catch로 감싸서 이미 존재하는 컬럼 에러 무시
- `BtnSave_Click`에서 저장 전 `AutoColumnCheck()` 호출

#### FrmMain.vb
- `InitControl()`에 `srcLbScanTarget.Visible = False`, `srcLbScanTarget.Text = ""` 추가 (리셋 시 숨김)
- `ResetRFiD()` 함수 추가 - Balluff RFID 리셋 명령 (ABx Fast Protocol - 0x35)
- `ReadRFiD()` 함수에 Chr() 문법 오류 검토 주석 추가

### 이미지 정리 스크립트
- `organize_images.ps1` 작성 - JG BACK 작업표준서 이미지 정리
- 1차/2차/3차/4차/5차 폴더로 분류 → op10/op20/op30/op40/op50으로 변경
- 파일명: 품번.확장자 형식 (예: 88310-DC000.jpg)
- 결과 폴더: `D:\Source\대일공업\JG\JG BACK 작업표준서 이미지_정리`

### Balluff RFID 관련 검토
- BIS M-410 모델 사용
- ABx Fast Protocol 사용
- 최소 명령 간격: 300ms (연속 폴링 금지)
- 리셋 명령: 0x35 (RESET CONTROLLER)
- Chr() 문법 오류 가능성 발견 (Chr("&H02") → Chr(&H02) 수정 필요)

content.text:
VB.NET .NET Framework 4.7 기반 POP(생산관리) 시스템 프로젝트입니다.

**PopV4 (FtechPopJG_CONV) 주요 구성:**
- **용도**: 자동차 시트 프레임 조립 라인 생산관리 + 품질검사
- **통신**: PLC (Mitsubishi MX Component), 바코드 스캐너, 레이저 마킹, RFID (Balluff), 공구 (Handy2000 Open Protocol)
- **주요 폼**: FrmMain(메인), FrmPart(부품관리), FrmSeq/FrmSeq2(시퀀스설정), FrmSet/FrmSet2(설정), FrmBarcode, FrmLaser 등
- **DB**: SQL Server (192.168.0.50, JG_FRT_BACK)

무엇을 작업하시겠습니까?

content.text:
**FrmMain**을 사용하고 있습니다.

- `Application.myapp`: `<MainForm>FrmMain</MainForm>`
- `Application.Designer.vb`: `Me.MainForm = Global.FtechPop.FrmMain`

**FrmMain2**는 프로젝트에 포함되어 있지만, 시작 폼으로 설정되어 있지 않습니다. CLAUDE.md 기록에 따르면 FrmMain2는 FlexCell → DataGridView 전환을 위해 만든 새 버전인데, 아직 로직 이식이 완료되지 않은 상태입니다.

  3718→    Private Function GetMaxMainRowNum() As Integer
  3719→
  3720→        Dim tmpMaxNum As Integer = 0
  3721→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
  3722→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
  3723→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
  3724→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
  3725→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
  3726→        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)
  3727→        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
  3728→            Rs.MoveFirst()
  3729→            Do Until Rs.EOF
  3730→                If tmpMaxNum < CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value) Then
  3731→                    tmpMaxNum = CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
  3732→                End If
  3733→                Rs.MoveNext()
  3734→            Loop
  3735→        End If
  3736→        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
  3737→        Rs.Close()
  3738→        ConnectionCloseMDB()
  3739→        Return tmpMaxNum
  3740→
  3741→    End Function
  3742→    Private Function ParseWord(ByVal input As String) As Integer
  3743→        Dim word As Integer = 0
  3744→        Dim bit As Integer = 0
  3745→        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
  3746→        If parts.Length = 2 Then
  3747→            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
  3748→            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
  3749→        Else
  3750→            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
  3751→            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
  3752→            bit = 0
  3753→        End If
  3754→        Return word
  3755→    End Function
  3756→    Private Function ParseBit(ByVal input As String) As Integer
  3757→        Dim word As Integer = 0
  3758→        Dim bit As Integer = 0
  3759→        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
  3760→        If parts.Length = 2 Then
  3761→            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
  3762→            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
  3763→        Else
  3764→            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
  3765→            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
  3766→            bit = 0
  3767→        End If
  3768→        Return bit
  3769→    End Function
  3770→    Private Function CheckIO() As Boolean
  3771→        Dim tmpIoCheck As Boolean = True
  3772→        Dim Word As Integer
  3773→        Dim Bit As Integer
  3774→
  3775→        ' 포트1 체크
  3776→        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort1(SeqCount)) Then
  3777→            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))
  3778→            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))
  3779→
  3780→            If SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
  3781→                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
  3782→            ElseIf SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
  3783→                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
  3784→            End If
  3785→        End If
  3786→
  3787→        ' 포트2 체크
  3788→        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort2(SeqCount)) Then
  3789→            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))

     5→### Grid1_CellPainting 예외 처리 추가
     6→- **문제:** CellPainting 이벤트에서 예외 발생 시 그리드 전체에 X 표시
     7→- **수정:** Try-Catch 추가 + `Grid1.Columns.Count = 0` 체크 추가

    12→## 2026-01-16 18:57
    13→
    14→### LoadWorkInfo에서 InitGrid 호출 누락 수정
    15→- **문제:** Grid에 X 표시 발생
    16→- **원인:** `LoadWorkInfo()` 호출 시 기존 그리드를 Clear하지 않고 행 추가 → 컬럼 구조 불일치 또는 중복 행 발생
    17→- **수정:** `LoadWorkInfo()` 시작 부분에 `InitGrid()` 호출 추가
    18→- 수정 파일: `PopV3\FrmMain.vb` (5110행)
    19→

    21→
    22→## 2026-01-16 18:56
    23→
    24→### FrmSeq 저장 시 유효성 검사 추가
    25→- **목적:** 잘못된 데이터 저장 시 FrmMain에서 NullReferenceException 방지
    26→- **검사 항목:**
    27→  1. Type 필수 (빈값 불가)
    28→  2. FontSize 숫자 검사 (8~100 범위)
    29→  3. MESSAGE(WorkInfo) 필수
    30→  4. DataSave=True 시 ColumnName 필수
    31→  5. IN1~4 주소 설정 시 State(ON/OFF) 필수
    32→  6. OUT1~4 주소 설정 시 ON/OFF 필수
    33→- 오류 발견 시 MessageBox로 경고 후 저장 차단
    34→- 수정 파일: `PopV3\FrmSeq.vb` (ValidateGridData 함수 추가)
    35→
    36→---
    37→
    38→## 2026-01-16 18:54
    39→
    40→### Grid X 표시 오류 수정 (NullReferenceException)
    41→- **문제:** 그리드 전체에 빨간 X 표시, "개체 참조가 개체의 인스턴스로 설정되지 않았습니다" 에러
    42→- **원인:** `LoadWorkInfo()` 함수에서 DB 필드 NULL 값 처리 안됨
    43→- **수정 내용:**
    44→  1. `LoadWorkInfo()` 전체 DB 필드에 NullCheck 적용
    45→     - `TmpFlagSeqIncludeBarcode`, `TmpFlagDuplicateCheck`, `tmpSeqType`, `tmpSeqTarget`, `tmpSeqWorkInfo` 등
    46→  2. `NullCheckInt()` 함수 추가 (Module1.vb) - Integer 타입 NULL 체크용
    47→  3. FontSize 필드: `NullCheckInt(값, 12)` 적용 (기본값 12)
    48→- 수정 파일:
    49→  - `PopV3\FrmMain.vb` (5122~5166행)
    50→  - `PopV3\Module1.vb` (NullCheckInt 함수 추가)
    51→
    52→---

    55→
    56→### FrmSignalIO/Plc MELSEC 출력 상태 표시 및 제어 수정
    57→- **문제:** MELSEC PLC 사용 시 출력 신호 상태 표시 안됨, LED 클릭 시 신호 안 나감
    58→- **원인:**
    59→  1. `DoutString`은 FTECH IO Board용으로만 갱신됨
    60→  2. `DOON/DOOFF`에서 `num1 <= 31` 조건이 IOTYPE보다 먼저 체크됨
    61→  3. FrmSignalPlc에서 MELSEC일 때 `IsClickable = False`
    62→- **수정 내용:**
    63→  1. `FrmSignalIO.vb` - Timer1_Tick, LedOut_Click IOTYPE별 분기 처리
    64→  2. `FrmMain.vb` - DOON/DOOFF/DOON_otherval에서 IOTYPE 체크 우선
    65→  3. `FrmMain.vb` - MELSEC 펄스/ALL OFF 범위 +20 → +63 (64개)
    66→  4. `FrmSIgnalPlc.vb` - `IsClickable = True`로 변경
    67→  5. `FrmMain.vb` - WritePlcMelsec 로그 추가
    68→- 수정 파일: `PopV3\FrmSignalIO.vb`, `PopV3\FrmSIgnalPlc.vb`, `PopV3\FrmMain.vb`

    75→- **문제:** MX Component ActiveX가 .NET 4.8에서 `CreateObject("ActProgType.ActQNUDECPUTCP")` 호출 시 오류 발생
    76→- **원인:** 타겟 PC에 등록된 COM 클래스명이 다름 + .NET 3.5 → 4.x 변경 시 COM Interop 호환성 문제
    77→- **해결:**
    78→  1. `AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP` ActiveX 컨트롤을 **코드에서 동적 생성** (Designer 사용 안 함 - 깨짐 방지)
    79→  2. vbproj에 `ACTETHERLib`, `AxACTETHERLib` COM 참조 추가
    80→  3. app.config에 `useLegacyV2RuntimeActivationPolicy="true"` 추가

### 1. Grid1 선언 및 초기화

**파일**: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PopV4\FrmMain.Designer.vb (라인 985)

```vb
Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid
```

**생성**: FrmMain.Designer.vb (라인 52)
```vb
Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()
```

**디자이너 속성** (라인 278-290):
- BorderStyle: None
- DefaultFont: Arial Narrow 21.75pt Bold
- DefaultRowHeight: 100
- Enabled: False
- Font: Arial Narrow 9pt Regular
- GridColor: RGB(192, 192, 192) - 밝은 회색
- Location: Point(482, 108)
- Size: 1429 x 904 픽셀
- ScrollBars: None
- TabIndex: 166

---

### 2. InitGrid() 함수 (라인 2676-2709)

**구조**:
```vb
Private Sub InitGrid()
    With Grid1
        .DisplayFocusRect = False
        .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
        .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None
        .Cols = 6          '6개 컬럼
        .Rows = 1          '1개 행 (헤더만)
        .Column(1).Locked = False
        .Column(2).Locked = False
        
        For i As Integer = 0 To 5
            .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
        Next
        
        .Column(0).Width = 0       '숨김 컬럼
        .Column(1).Width = 90      'NO'
        .Column(2).Width = 450     'MESSAGE'
        .Column(3).Width = 350     'IMAGE'
        .Column(4).Width = 330     'WORK INFO'
        .Column(5).Width = 200     'INSPECTION'
        
        .Cell(0, 1).Text = "NO"
        .Cell(0, 2).Text = "MESSAGE"
        .Cell(0, 3).Text = "IMAGE"
        .Cell(0, 4).Text = "WORK INFO"
        .Cell(0, 5).Text = "INSPECTION"
        
        .Row(0).Height = 45        '헤더 높이
        .DefaultRowHeight = CInt(GridHeight)  '기본 행 높이 (동적)
        .AutoRedraw = True
        .Images.Clear()
        .Refresh()
    End With
End Sub
```

**주요 특징**:
- 6개 컬럼, 1개 헤더 행으로 시작
- 모든 컬럼 중앙 정렬
- 컬럼 0은 너비 0 (숨김)
- 컬럼 1, 2는 잠금 해제 (편집 가능)
- OwnerDraw 모드로 커스텀 그리기
- 기본 행 높이는 GridHeight 전역변수에서 가져옴

---

### 3. 컬럼 구조

| 컬럼 | 너비 | 헤더 | 데이터 타입 | 비고 |
|------|------|------|-----------|------|
| 0 | 0 | - | - | 숨김 (내부용) |
| 1 | 90 | NO | 순번 (i+1) | 잠금 해제 |
| 2 | 450 | MESSAGE | WorkInfo(DB) | 잠금 해제, 동적 폰트 크기 |
| 3 | 350 | IMAGE | 이미지 경로 | SetImage()로 표시 |
| 4 | 330 | WORK INFO | Target(DB) | 폰트: Arial Narrow 30pt Bold |
| 5 | 200 | INSPECTION | OK/NG 결과 | 폰트: Arial Narrow 40pt Bold |

---

### 4. 데이터 로드 - Grid1.AddItem() (라인 3465-3482)

**로케이션**: ProductionPlannerTouch 함수 내부

**행 추가 방식**: Tab(Chr(9)) 구분자로 컬럼 구분
```vb
If tmpSeqType(i).Contains("TQ") = True Then
    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &      'Col1: NO
                  Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) & 'Col2: MESSAGE
                  "" & Chr(9) &                'Col3: IMAGE (비어있음)
                  "" & Chr(9) &                'Col4: WORK INFO (TQ는 공백)
                  "")                          'Col5: INSPECTION (공백)
                  
ElseIf tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") = True Then
    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &      'Col1: NO
                  Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) & 'Col2: MESSAGE
                  "" & Chr(9) &                'Col3: IMAGE (비어있음)
                  "" & Chr(9) &                'Col4: WORK INFO (SCAN은 공백)
                  "")                          'Col5: INSPECTION (공백)
                  
Else
    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &      'Col1: NO
                  Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) & 'Col2: MESSAGE
                  "" & Chr(9) &                'Col3: IMAGE (비어있음)
                  Rs.Fields("Target").Value & Chr(9) & 'Col4: WORK INFO (Target 데이터)
                  "")                          'Col5: INSPECTION (공백 초기값)
End If
```

---

### 5. 셀 포맷팅 (라인 3485-3492)

**폰트 설정**:
```vb
Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 2).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", _
    CInt(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value), FontStyle.Bold)

Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 4).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 30, FontStyle.Bold)
    '→ WORK INFO 셀: 고정 30pt

Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 5).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 40, FontStyle.Bold)
    '→ INSPECTION 셀: 고정 40pt Bold
```

**이미지 삽입** (라인 3488-3492):
```vb
Try
    Img(i) = New Bitmap(tmpSubImagePath(i))      '이미지 로드
    Grid1.Images.Add(Img(i), "Image" & CStr(i))  'Grid1의 이미지 컬렉션에 추가
    Img(i) = Nothing
    Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 3).SetImage("Image" & CStr(i))  '컬럼 3에 표시
Catch ex As Exception

End Try
```

---

### 6. 셀 업데이트 - DisplayGrid() (라인 3697-3716)

**INSPECTION 결과 표시** (라인 3698-3705):
```vb
Private Sub DisplayGrid(ByVal strDAta As String, ByVal strDec As String, ByVal Seq As Integer)
    Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 4).Text = strDAta       'WORK INFO 셀 업데이트
    Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).Text = strDec       'INSPECTION 셀 업데이트
    
    If strDec = "OK" Then
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).BackColor = Color.Blue    '파란 배경
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).ForeColor = Color.White   '하얀 텍스트
    Else
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).BackColor = Color.Red     '빨간 배경
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).ForeColor = Color.White   '하얀 텍스트
    End If
End Sub
```

**셀 선택 (포커싱)** (라인 3227-3229):
```vb
Private Sub FocusingGrid(ByVal WorkNum As Integer)
    Try
        Grid1.Cell(WorkNum, 1).ForeColor = Color.White    '텍스트 흰색
        Grid1.Cell(WorkNum, 1).BackColor = Color.Black    '배경 검정
        Grid1.Cell(WorkNum + 2, 1).EnsureVisible()        '화면에 보이도록 스크롤
    Catch ex As Exception
    End Try
End Sub
```

#### Initialization - InitGrid() (Lines 4218-4304)

```vb
Private Sub InitGrid()
    With Grid1
        .SuspendLayout()
        .Visible = False
        .Rows.Clear()
        .Columns.Clear()
        
        ' 6 columns: Hidden, NO, MESSAGE, IMAGE, WORK INFO, INSPECTION
        Dim colNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colNo.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
        
        ' WORK INFO column - 30pt Arial Narrow Bold
        Dim colWork As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colWork.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 30, FontStyle.Bold)
        
        ' INSPECTION column - 40pt Arial Narrow Bold
        Dim colInsp As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colInsp.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 40, FontStyle.Bold)
        
        ' Header styling
        Dim headerStyle As New DataGridViewCellStyle()
        headerStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 14, FontStyle.Bold)
        headerStyle.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(64, 64, 64)
        headerStyle.ForeColor = Color.White
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle = headerStyle
        .ColumnHeadersHeight = 45
        .EnableHeadersVisualStyles = False  ' Critical for custom styling
        
        ' Row height - configurable from database (GridHeight variable)
        If GridHeight <> "" AndAlso IsNumeric(GridHeight) Then
            .RowTemplate.Height = CInt(GridHeight)
        Else
            .RowTemplate.Height = 40  ' Default
        End If
        
        .Visible = True
        .ResumeLayout()
    End With
    
    ' Attach CellPainting event for auto font sizing
    RemoveHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
    AddHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
    
    Grid1.Refresh()
    Application.DoEvents()
End Sub
```

#### Auto Font Sizing Feature - Grid1_CellPainting() (Lines 4309-4352)

**Key Feature**: Automatically adjusts font size to fit cell dimensions

```vb
Private Sub Grid1_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs)
    Try
        ' Skip header, image columns
        If e.RowIndex < 0 Then Return
        If e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
        If Grid1.Columns.Count = 0 Then Return
        
        Dim colName As String = Grid1.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ColImage" OrElse colName = "ColHidden" Then Return
        
        Dim cellValue As String = If(e.Value, "").ToString()
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cellValue) Then Return
        
        ' Cell bounds and text area (with padding)
        Dim cellRect As Rectangle = e.CellBounds
        Dim textRect As New Rectangle(cellRect.X + 4, cellRect.Y + 2, cellRect.Width - 8, cellRect.Height - 4)
        
        ' Auto-calculate optimal font size using binary search
        Dim fontFamily As String = "Arial Narrow"
        Dim fontSize As Single = CalculateFontSize(cellValue, textRect, fontFamily, e.Graphics)
        
        ' Draw text with calculated font size
        Using font As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
            Dim sf As New StringFormat()
            sf.Alignment = StringAlignment.Center
            sf.LineAlignment = StringAlignment.Center
            
            Dim textColor As Color = If(e.CellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Empty, Color.Black, e.CellStyle.ForeColor)
            Using brush As New SolidBrush(textColor)
                e.Graphics.DrawString(cellValue, font, brush, textRect, sf)
            End Using
        End Using
        
        e.Handled = True
    Catch
        ' Silently handle exceptions
    End Try
End Sub
```

#### Font Size Calculation Algorithm - CalculateFontSize() (Lines 4357-4376)

**Binary Search Algorithm** to find optimal font size:

```vb
Private Function CalculateFontSize(text As String, rect As Rectangle, fontFamily As String, g As Graphics) As Single
    Dim minSize As Single = 16
    Dim maxSize As Single = 40
    Dim fontSize As Single = maxSize
    
    ' Binary search for optimal size
    While maxSize - minSize > 1
        fontSize = (minSize + maxSize) / 2
        Using testFont As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
            Dim textSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(text, testFont)
            If textSize.Width <= rect.Width AndAlso textSize.Height <= rect.Height Then
                minSize = fontSize
            Else
                maxSize = fontSize
            End If
        End Using
    End While
    
    Return minSize  ' Return largest size that fits
End Function
```

**Key Parameters:**
- Min font size: 16pt
- Max font size: 40pt
- Font family: "Arial Narrow" (Bold)
- Padding: 4px left/right, 2px top, 4px bottom

#### Column-Based Styling (FrmSeq.vb:29-73)

**CellPainting Event** for conditional background colors:

```vb
Private Sub DgvSeq_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellPainting
    If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
    
    Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
    Dim cellValue As String = NullCheck(e.Value)
    Dim needCustomPaint As Boolean = False
    Dim backColor As Color = Color.White
    Dim foreColor As Color = Color.Black
    
    ' IO address columns: IN1, IN2, IN3, IN4, OUT1, OUT2, OUT3, OUT4
    If colName = "IN1" OrElse colName = "IN2" OrElse ... Then
        ' If value is not "NoUse" and not empty → Black background + White text
        If cellValue <> "NoUse" AndAlso cellValue <> "" Then
            backColor = Color.Black
            foreColor = Color.White
            needCustomPaint = True
        End If
    
    ' IO state columns: IN1_STATE, OUT1_ONOFF, etc.
    ElseIf colName = "IN1_STATE" OrElse colName = "OUT1_ONOFF" OrElse ... Then
        ' If value is not "-" and not empty → Black background + White text
        If cellValue <> "-" AndAlso cellValue <> "" Then
            backColor = Color.Black
            foreColor = Color.White
            needCustomPaint = True
        End If
    End If
    
    ' Custom painting
    If needCustomPaint Then
        Using brush As New SolidBrush(backColor)
            e.Graphics.FillRectangle(brush, e.CellBounds)
        End Using
        ' Draw text and dropdown button
        TextRenderer.DrawText(e.Graphics, cellValue, e.CellStyle.Font, textRect, foreColor, ...)
        ControlPaint.DrawComboButton(e.Graphics, buttonRect, ButtonState.Normal)
        e.Handled = True
    End If
End Sub
```

**Styling Rules:**
- **IO addresses (IN1~4, OUT1~4)**: Black bg + White text if value ≠ "NoUse"
- **IO states (IN1_STATE~4, OUT1_ONOFF~4)**: Black bg + White text if value ≠ "-"
- **Default**: White background + Black text

```vb
Private Sub DisplayGrid(ByVal strDAta As String, ByVal strDec As String, ByVal Seq As Integer)
    ' Updates WORK INFO and INSPECTION columns
    If Seq < 0 OrElse Seq >= Grid1.Rows.Count Then Exit Sub
    Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(4).Value = strDAta
    Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Value = strDec
    
    ' Color coding for results
    If strDec = "OK" Then
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
    ElseIf strDec = "NG" Then
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.Red
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
    Else
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.White
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.Black
    End If
End Sub
```

#### FocusingGrid() - Highlighting Current Row (FrmMain.vb:5052-5066)

```vb
Private Sub FocusingGrid(ByVal WorkNum As Integer)
    Try
        ' 1-based to 0-based conversion
        Dim dataRow As Integer = WorkNum - 1
        If dataRow < 0 OrElse dataRow >= Grid1.Rows.Count Then Exit Sub
        
        ' Highlight NO column (column 1)
        Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
        Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.BackColor = Color.Black
        
        ' Scroll to show current + next 2 rows
        Dim scrollRow As Integer = Math.Min(dataRow + 2, Grid1.Rows.Count - 1)
        If scrollRow >= 0 Then Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = Math.Max(0, scrollRow - 2)
    Catch ex As Exception
    End Try
End Sub
```

### 6. Important Settings and Best Practices

#### Critical EnableHeadersVisualStyles Setting
```vb
.EnableHeadersVisualStyles = False  ' Required for custom styling to work
```
- If set to True, custom header styles may be ignored
- Must be set BEFORE applying custom header styles

#### SuspendLayout/ResumeLayout Pattern
```vb
.SuspendLayout()  ' Disable painting during setup
' ... configure columns, rows, styles ...
.ResumeLayout()   ' Re-enable painting
```
- Improves performance during initialization
- Prevents flickering during UI updates

#### CellPainting Event Handler Pattern
```vb
RemoveHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
AddHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
```
- Always remove before adding to prevent duplicate handlers
- Called for every cell during rendering

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report:

## dsc_pop DataGridView Usage Analysis

Based on my exploration of the C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_pop project, here's a comprehensive overview of how DataGridView is used, with emphasis on auto font sizing and styling features.

### Key Files

1. **Main Forms**
   - `/PopV3/FrmMain.vb` - Primary form with DataGridView (Grid1)
   - `/PopV3/FrmSeq.vb` - Sequence editor form with DataGridView (DgvSeq)
   - `/PopV3/GridHelper.vb` - Helper module for DataGridView utilities

2. **Project Structure**
   - Path: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_pop\PopV3\`
   - Language: VB.NET (.NET Framework 4.8)
   - File type: Windows Forms application

---

### 1. Main DataGridView (FrmMain - Grid1)

#### Initialization - InitGrid() (Lines 4218-4304)

```vb
Private Sub InitGrid()
    With Grid1
        .SuspendLayout()
        .Visible = False
        .Rows.Clear()
        .Columns.Clear()
        
        ' 6 columns: Hidden, NO, MESSAGE, IMAGE, WORK INFO, INSPECTION
        Dim colNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colNo.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
        
        ' WORK INFO column - 30pt Arial Narrow Bold
        Dim colWork As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colWork.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 30, FontStyle.Bold)
        
        ' INSPECTION column - 40pt Arial Narrow Bold
        Dim colInsp As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
        colInsp.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 40, FontStyle.Bold)
        
        ' Header styling
        Dim headerStyle As New DataGridViewCellStyle()
        headerStyle.Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 14, FontStyle.Bold)
        headerStyle.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(64, 64, 64)
        headerStyle.ForeColor = Color.White
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle = headerStyle
        .ColumnHeadersHeight = 45
        .EnableHeadersVisualStyles = False  ' Critical for custom styling
        
        ' Row height - configurable from database (GridHeight variable)
        If GridHeight <> "" AndAlso IsNumeric(GridHeight) Then
            .RowTemplate.Height = CInt(GridHeight)
        Else
            .RowTemplate.Height = 40  ' Default
        End If
        
        .Visible = True
        .ResumeLayout()
    End With
    
    ' Attach CellPainting event for auto font sizing
    RemoveHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
    AddHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
    
    Grid1.Refresh()
    Application.DoEvents()
End Sub
```

#### Auto Font Sizing Feature - Grid1_CellPainting() (Lines 4309-4352)

**Key Feature**: Automatically adjusts font size to fit cell dimensions

```vb
Private Sub Grid1_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs)
    Try
        ' Skip header, image columns
        If e.RowIndex < 0 Then Return
        If e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
        If Grid1.Columns.Count = 0 Then Return
        
        Dim colName As String = Grid1.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ColImage" OrElse colName = "ColHidden" Then Return
        
        Dim cellValue As String = If(e.Value, "").ToString()
        If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cellValue) Then Return
        
        ' Cell bounds and text area (with padding)
        Dim cellRect As Rectangle = e.CellBounds
        Dim textRect As New Rectangle(cellRect.X + 4, cellRect.Y + 2, cellRect.Width - 8, cellRect.Height - 4)
        
        ' Auto-calculate optimal font size using binary search
        Dim fontFamily As String = "Arial Narrow"
        Dim fontSize As Single = CalculateFontSize(cellValue, textRect, fontFamily, e.Graphics)
        
        ' Draw text with calculated font size
        Using font As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
            Dim sf As New StringFormat()
            sf.Alignment = StringAlignment.Center
            sf.LineAlignment = StringAlignment.Center
            
            Dim textColor As Color = If(e.CellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Empty, Color.Black, e.CellStyle.ForeColor)
            Using brush As New SolidBrush(textColor)
                e.Graphics.DrawString(cellValue, font, brush, textRect, sf)
            End Using
        End Using
        
        e.Handled = True
    Catch
        ' Silently handle exceptions
    End Try
End Sub
```

#### Font Size Calculation Algorithm - CalculateFontSize() (Lines 4357-4376)

**Binary Search Algorithm** to find optimal font size:

```vb
Private Function CalculateFontSize(text As String, rect As Rectangle, fontFamily As String, g As Graphics) As Single
    Dim minSize As Single = 16
    Dim maxSize As Single = 40
    Dim fontSize As Single = maxSize
    
    ' Binary search for optimal size
    While maxSize - minSize > 1
        fontSize = (minSize + maxSize) / 2
        Using testFont As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
            Dim textSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(text, testFont)
            If textSize.Width <= rect.Width AndAlso textSize.Height <= rect.Height Then
                minSize = fontSize
            Else
                maxSize = fontSize
            End If
        End Using
    End While
    
    Return minSize  ' Return largest size that fits
End Function
```

**Key Parameters:**
- Min font size: 16pt
- Max font size: 40pt
- Font family: "Arial Narrow" (Bold)
- Padding: 4px left/right, 2px top, 4px bottom

**Column Configuration:**

- Header height: Auto
- Special columns: ComboBox columns for IO addresses and state

#### Column-Based Styling (FrmSeq.vb:29-73)

**CellPainting Event** for conditional background colors:

```vb
Private Sub DgvSeq_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellPainting
    If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
    
    Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
    Dim cellValue As String = NullCheck(e.Value)
    Dim needCustomPaint As Boolean = False
    Dim backColor As Color = Color.White
    Dim foreColor As Color = Color.Black
    
    ' IO address columns: IN1, IN2, IN3, IN4, OUT1, OUT2, OUT3, OUT4
    If colName = "IN1" OrElse colName = "IN2" OrElse ... Then
        ' If value is not "NoUse" and not empty → Black background + White text
        If cellValue <> "NoUse" AndAlso cellValue <> "" Then
            backColor = Color.Black
            foreColor = Color.White
            needCustomPaint = True
        End If
    
    ' IO state columns: IN1_STATE, OUT1_ONOFF, etc.
    ElseIf colName = "IN1_STATE" OrElse colName = "OUT1_ONOFF" OrElse ... Then
        ' If value is not "-" and not empty → Black background + White text
        If cellValue <> "-" AndAlso cellValue <> "" Then
            backColor = Color.Black
            foreColor = Color.White
            needCustomPaint = True
        End If
    End If
    
    ' Custom painting
    If needCustomPaint Then
        Using brush As New SolidBrush(backColor)
            e.Graphics.FillRectangle(brush, e.CellBounds)
        End Using
        ' Draw text and dropdown button
        TextRenderer.DrawText(e.Graphics, cellValue, e.CellStyle.Font, textRect, foreColor, ...)
        ControlPaint.DrawComboButton(e.Graphics, buttonRect, ButtonState.Normal)
        e.Handled = True
    End If
End Sub
```

**Styling Rules:**
- **IO addresses (IN1~4, OUT1~4)**: Black bg + White text if value ≠ "NoUse"
- **IO states (IN1_STATE~4, OUT1_ONOFF~4)**: Black bg + White text if value ≠ "-"
- **Default**: White background + Black text

### 3. GridHelper Module - Utility Functions

**File**: `/PopV3/GridHelper.vb` (427 lines)

#### Helper Functions Overview:

|----------|---------|

| `SetCellText(dgv, row, col, text)` | Write cell text (1-based index) |
| `SetCellBackColor(dgv, row, col, color)` | Set background color |
| `SetCellForeColor(dgv, row, col, color)` | Set text color |
| `SetCellFont(dgv, row, col, font)` | Set font |
| `InitializeGridStyle(dgv)` | Initialize default styling |
| `InitializeMainGrid(dgv)` | Initialize FrmMain's 6-column grid |
| `GridCell(dgv, row, col)` | FlexCell compatibility wrapper |

#### Key Utility - InitializeGridStyle() (Lines 256-281)

```vb
Public Sub InitializeGridStyle(dgv As DataGridView)
    With dgv
        .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
        .AllowUserToResizeRows = False
        .RowHeadersVisible = False
        .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
        .MultiSelect = False
        .ReadOnly = True
        .BackgroundColor = Color.White
        .BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle
        .EnableHeadersVisualStyles = False  ' Critical
        
        ' Header styling
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(64, 64, 64)
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.ForeColor = Color.White
        .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 11, FontStyle.Bold)
        .ColumnHeadersHeight = 35
        .ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.DisableResizing
        
        ' Cell styling
        .DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
        .DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 11, FontStyle.Regular)
    End With
End Sub
```

#### InitializeMainGrid() - FrmMain Grid Template (Lines 286-330)

Pre-configured 6-column layout with image support:

```vb
Public Sub InitializeMainGrid(dgv As DataGridView)
    ' Column 1: NO (90px width)
    ' Column 2: MESSAGE (450px) - Text
    ' Column 3: IMAGE (350px) - Image column with Zoom layout
    ' Column 4: WORK INFO (330px) - Large text display
    ' Column 5: INSPECTION (200px) - Pass/Fail result
    
    dgv.RowTemplate.Height = 80  ' Row height optimized for images
End Sub
```

---

### 4. Data Loading and Display

#### DisplayGrid() - Result Updates (FrmMain.vb:5511-5526)

```vb
Private Sub DisplayGrid(ByVal strDAta As String, ByVal strDec As String, ByVal Seq As Integer)
    ' Updates WORK INFO and INSPECTION columns
    If Seq < 0 OrElse Seq >= Grid1.Rows.Count Then Exit Sub
    Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(4).Value = strDAta
    Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Value = strDec
    
    ' Color coding for results
    If strDec = "OK" Then
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
    ElseIf strDec = "NG" Then
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.Red
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
    Else
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.BackColor = Color.White
        Grid1.Rows(Seq).Cells(5).Style.ForeColor = Color.Black
    End If
End Sub
```

#### FocusingGrid() - Highlighting Current Row (FrmMain.vb:5052-5066)

```vb
Private Sub FocusingGrid(ByVal WorkNum As Integer)
    Try
        ' 1-based to 0-based conversion
        Dim dataRow As Integer = WorkNum - 1
        If dataRow < 0 OrElse dataRow >= Grid1.Rows.Count Then Exit Sub
        
        ' Highlight NO column (column 1)
        Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
        Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.BackColor = Color.Black
        
        ' Scroll to show current + next 2 rows
        Dim scrollRow As Integer = Math.Min(dataRow + 2, Grid1.Rows.Count - 1)
        If scrollRow >= 0 Then Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = Math.Max(0, scrollRow - 2)
    Catch ex As Exception
    End Try
End Sub
```

---

### 5. Key Configuration and Database Integration

#### GridHeight Configuration

- **Source**: Database `Table_SET.GridHeight` column
- **Type**: Numeric string (default: "40")
- **Applied in**: `InitGrid()` at lines 4285-4289
- **Effect**: Controls row height for dynamic content scaling

#### FontSize Field in Sequences

- **Database Column**: `Table_SEQ.FontSize`
- **Used By**: FrmSeq for display
- **Validation**: Must be 8~100 (set in FrmSeq.vb SaveGrid validation)
- **Default Value**: 30pt

---

### 6. Important Settings and Best Practices

#### Critical EnableHeadersVisualStyles Setting
```vb
.EnableHeadersVisualStyles = False  ' Required for custom styling to work
```
- If set to True, custom header styles may be ignored
- Must be set BEFORE applying custom header styles

#### SuspendLayout/ResumeLayout Pattern
```vb
.SuspendLayout()  ' Disable painting during setup
' ... configure columns, rows, styles ...
.ResumeLayout()   ' Re-enable painting
```
- Improves performance during initialization
- Prevents flickering during UI updates

#### CellPainting Event Handler Pattern
```vb
RemoveHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
AddHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
```
- Always remove before adding to prevent duplicate handlers
- Called for every cell during rendering

#Region "Screen Control"

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None
            .Cols = 6
            .Rows = 1
            .Column(1).Locked = False
            .Column(2).Locked = False

            For i As Integer = 0 To 5
                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            Next
            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 90
            .Column(2).Width = 450
            .Column(3).Width = 350
            .Column(4).Width = 330
            .Column(5).Width = 200
            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "NO"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "MESSAGE"
            .Cell(0, 3).Text = "IMAGE"
            .Cell(0, 4).Text = "WORK INFO"
            .Cell(0, 5).Text = "INSPECTION"
            .Row(0).Height = 45
            .DefaultRowHeight = CInt(GridHeight)
            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Images.Clear()
            .Refresh()
        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitControl()

        lbAlarm.Visible = False

        Try

            FrmNg.Visible = False

            'InitGrid()

SeqOutPort1ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort2ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort3ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort4ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)

                If tmpSeqType(i).Contains("TQ") = True Then
                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "")
                ElseIf tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") = True Then
                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "")
                Else
                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("Target").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "")
                End If

                Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 2).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", CInt(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value), FontStyle.Bold)
                Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 4).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 30, FontStyle.Bold)
                Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 5).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 40, FontStyle.Bold)
                Try
                    Img(i) = New Bitmap(tmpSubImagePath(i))
                    Grid1.Images.Add(Img(i), "Image" & CStr(i))
                    Img(i) = Nothing
                    Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 3).SetImage("Image" & CStr(i))
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Img(i) = Nothing
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        SeqTotal = Rs.RecordCount
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        wStep = 11

    Private Sub DisplayGrid(ByVal strDAta As String, ByVal strDec As String, ByVal Seq As Integer)
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 4).Text = strDAta
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).Text = strDec
        If strDec = "OK" Then
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).BackColor = Color.Blue
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).BackColor = Color.Red
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).ForeColor = Color.White
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DisplayGridMSG(ByVal strDAta As String, ByVal strDec As String, ByVal Seq As Integer)
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 4).Text = strDAta
        Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).Text = strDec
        If strDec = "OK" Then
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).BackColor = Color.Blue
            Grid1.Cell(Seq + 1, 5).ForeColor = Color.White
        End If
    End Sub

Try
            If LineType = "START" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "INSERT INTO " & ServerTableName & " (PartNo,PartName,SerialNo," & ServerColumnName & "_Date," & ServerColumnName & "_StartTime," & ServerColumnName & "_EndTime," & ServerColumnName & "_Decision,"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then
                        strSQL = strSQL & "" & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & ","
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"
                strSQL = strSQL & " VALUES (" & "'" & srcLbPartNo.Text & "','" & srcLbPartName.Text & "','" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "','" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "','" & StartTime & "','" & EndTime & "','" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then
                        If tmpSeqType(i - 1).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i - 1) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text & "',"
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")
                SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
                ConnectionCloseSQL()

            ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "UPDATE " & ServerTableName & " SET " &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Date" & " = " & "'" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_StartTime" & " = " & "'" & StartTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_EndTime" & " = " & "'" & EndTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Decision" & " = " & "'" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then

                        If tmpSeqType(i - 1).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & " = " & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i - 1) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & " = " & "'" & Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text & "',"
                        End If

                    End If
                Next

                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & " "
                strSQL = strSQL & "WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")

Dim TmpstrScan As String = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                    Dim splitScan() As String
                    splitScan = Split(TmpstrScan, "/")

                    If splitScan.Length = 1 Then

                        Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 4).Text = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        wStep = 116

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 2 Then

                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True Then
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1))
                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = "0" Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                wStep = 117
                            Else
                                Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 4).Text = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                wStep = 116
                            End If
                            Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 4).Text = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        End If

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 3 Then

                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True And TmpstrScan.Contains("COLOR") = True Then
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1)) &
                                                     Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(srcLbSerialNo.Text, 3)
                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = "0" Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                wStep = 117
                            Else
                                Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 4).Text = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                wStep = 116
                            End If
                            Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 4).Text = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        End If

                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 116 Then

                    If Grid1.Cell(SeqCount + 1, 5).Text = "OK" Then
                        wStep = 117
                    End If

Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None
            .Cols = 6
            .Rows = 1

Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1
            .SuspendLayout()
            .Visible = False
            .Rows.Clear()
            .Columns.Clear()

            ' Column 0: Hidden
            Dim colHidden As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colHidden.Name = "ColHidden"
            colHidden.HeaderText = ""
            colHidden.Width = 0
            colHidden.Visible = False
            .Columns.Add(colHidden)

            ' Column 1: NO
            Dim colNo As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colNo.Name = "ColNo"
            colNo.HeaderText = "NO"
            colNo.Width = 90
            colNo.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .Columns.Add(colNo)

            ' Column 2: MESSAGE
            Dim colMsg As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colMsg.Name = "ColMessage"
            colMsg.HeaderText = "MESSAGE"
            colMsg.Width = 450
            colMsg.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .Columns.Add(colMsg)

            ' Column 3: IMAGE
            Dim colImg As New DataGridViewImageColumn()
            colImg.Name = "ColImage"
            colImg.HeaderText = "IMAGE"
            colImg.Width = 350
            colImg.ImageLayout = DataGridViewImageCellLayout.Zoom
            colImg.DefaultCellStyle.NullValue = Nothing
            .Columns.Add(colImg)

            ' Column 4: WORK INFO
            Dim colWork As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colWork.Name = "ColWork"
            colWork.HeaderText = "WORK INFO"
            colWork.Width = 330
            colWork.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .Columns.Add(colWork)

            ' Column 5: INSPECTION
            Dim colInsp As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
            colInsp.Name = "ColInsp"
            colInsp.HeaderText = "INSPECTION"
            colInsp.Width = 200
            colInsp.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            .Columns.Add(colInsp)

            ' Row height from DB setting
            If GridHeight <> "" AndAlso IsNumeric(GridHeight) Then
                .RowTemplate.Height = CInt(GridHeight)
            Else
                .RowTemplate.Height = 100
            End If

            .ColumnHeadersVisible = False
            .Visible = True
            .ResumeLayout()
        End With

        ' Attach auto font sizing event
        RemoveHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting
        AddHandler Grid1.CellPainting, AddressOf Grid1_CellPainting

        Grid1.Refresh()
        Application.DoEvents()

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Auto font sizing - adjusts font to fit cell bounds
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Grid1_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs)
        Try
            If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
            If Grid1.Columns.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim colName As String = Grid1.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
            ' Skip image and hidden columns
            If colName = "ColImage" OrElse colName = "ColHidden" Then Return

            Dim cellValue As String = If(e.Value, "").ToString()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cellValue) Then Return

            ' Paint background first
            e.PaintBackground(e.ClipBounds, True)

            ' Cell text area with padding
            Dim cellRect As Rectangle = e.CellBounds
            Dim textRect As New Rectangle(cellRect.X + 4, cellRect.Y + 2, cellRect.Width - 8, cellRect.Height - 4)

            ' Calculate optimal font size
            Dim fontFamily As String = "Arial Narrow"
            Dim fontSize As Single = CalculateFontSize(cellValue, textRect, fontFamily, e.Graphics)

            ' Draw text
            Using font As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim sf As New StringFormat()
                sf.Alignment = StringAlignment.Center
                sf.LineAlignment = StringAlignment.Center

                Dim textColor As Color = If(e.CellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Empty, Color.Black, e.CellStyle.ForeColor)
                Using brush As New SolidBrush(textColor)
                    e.Graphics.DrawString(cellValue, font, brush, textRect, sf)
                End Using
            End Using

            e.Handled = True
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Binary search to find largest font size that fits within rectangle
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function CalculateFontSize(text As String, rect As Rectangle, fontFamily As String, g As Graphics) As Single
        Dim minSize As Single = 12
        Dim maxSize As Single = 50
        Dim fontSize As Single = maxSize

        While maxSize - minSize > 1
            fontSize = (minSize + maxSize) / 2
            Using testFont As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim textSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(text, testFont)
                If textSize.Width <= rect.Width AndAlso textSize.Height <= rect.Height Then
                    minSize = fontSize
                Else
                    maxSize = fontSize
                End If
            End Using
        End While

        Return minSize
    End Function

﻿Imports System.Net.Sockets
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text

Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Management
Imports System.Security.Cryptography
Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions
Imports System.Threading.Tasks
Imports System.Diagnostics


Public Class FrmMain

    ' MX Component ActiveX - 디자이너 깨짐 방지를 위해 코드에서 동적 생성
    Private WithEvents ActPlc As AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP

#Region "BiosLock"

    Public ReadOnly bBiosMake As Boolean = True

    Private Sub BiosLock()

        Try
            Dim mbInfo As String = String.Empty
            Dim scope As ManagementScope = New ManagementScope("\\" & Environment.MachineName & "\root\cimv2")
            scope.Connect()
            Dim wmiClass As ManagementObject = New ManagementObject(scope, New ManagementPath("Win32_BaseBoard.Tag=""Base Board"""), New ObjectGetOptions())

            For Each propData As PropertyData In wmiClass.Properties
                If propData.Name = "SerialNumber" Then mbInfo = Convert.ToString(propData.Value)
            Next
            'FTECH는 비번
            Dim sEncrypt As String = Encrypt(mbInfo, "FTECH")
            sEncrypt = RemoveSpecialCharacters(sEncrypt)
            Dim sPath As String = Path.GetPathRoot(System.Environment.CurrentDirectory) & sEncrypt & ".lock"

            'lincense file 생성(*라이센스파일 경로 : C:\파일명.lock)
            'If bBiosMake Then
            '    If Not File.Exists(sPath) Then
            '        File.Create(sPath)
            '        MessageBox.Show("라이센스 생성 완료", "Complete")
            '        System.Environment.[Exit](0)
            '    End If
            'End If

            'lincense file 비교
            If Not File.Exists(sPath) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Need Licence.", "Error")
                System.Environment.[Exit](0)
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error : " & ex.ToString, "Error")
            System.Environment.[Exit](0)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Public Shared Function Decrypt(ByVal textToDecrypt As String, ByVal key As String) As String
        Dim rijndaelCipher As RijndaelManaged = New RijndaelManaged()
        rijndaelCipher.Mode = CipherMode.CBC
        rijndaelCipher.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7
        rijndaelCipher.KeySize = 128
        rijndaelCipher.BlockSize = 128
        Dim encryptedData As Byte() = Convert.FromBase64String(textToDecrypt)
        Dim pwdBytes As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key)
        Dim keyBytes As Byte() = New Byte(15) {}
        Dim len As Integer = pwdBytes.Length

        If len > keyBytes.Length Then
            len = keyBytes.Length
        End If

        Array.Copy(pwdBytes, keyBytes, len)
        rijndaelCipher.Key = keyBytes
        rijndaelCipher.IV = keyBytes
        Dim plainText As Byte() = rijndaelCipher.CreateDecryptor().TransformFinalBlock(encryptedData, 0, encryptedData.Length)
        Return Encoding.UTF8.GetString(plainText)
    End Function

    Public Shared Function Encrypt(ByVal textToEncrypt As String, ByVal key As String) As String
        Dim rijndaelCipher As RijndaelManaged = New RijndaelManaged()
        rijndaelCipher.Mode = CipherMode.CBC
        rijndaelCipher.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7
        rijndaelCipher.KeySize = 128
        rijndaelCipher.BlockSize = 128
        Dim pwdBytes As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key)
        Dim keyBytes As Byte() = New Byte(15) {}
        Dim len As Integer = pwdBytes.Length

        If len > keyBytes.Length Then
            len = keyBytes.Length
        End If

        Array.Copy(pwdBytes, keyBytes, len)
        rijndaelCipher.Key = keyBytes
        rijndaelCipher.IV = keyBytes
        Dim transform As ICryptoTransform = rijndaelCipher.CreateEncryptor()
        Dim plainText As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(textToEncrypt)
        Return Convert.ToBase64String(transform.TransformFinalBlock(plainText, 0, plainText.Length))
    End Function

    Public Shared Function RemoveSpecialCharacters(ByVal str As String) As String
        Dim buffer As Char() = New Char(str.Length - 1) {}
        Dim idx As Integer = 0

        For Each c As Char In str

            If (c >= "0"c AndAlso c <= "9"c) OrElse (c >= "A"c AndAlso c <= "Z"c) OrElse (c >= "a"c AndAlso c <= "z"c) OrElse (c = "."c) OrElse (c = "_"c) Then
                buffer(idx) = c
                idx += 1
            End If
        Next

        Return New String(buffer, 0, idx)
    End Function

#End Region

#Region "Variable"

    Private RfidStep1 As Integer
    Private RfidStep2 As Integer
    Private FLagRfid1 As Boolean
    Private FLagRfid2 As Boolean

    Private FLagSaveCompleted As Boolean
    Private gSerial As String

    Private ScanType As String
    Private TmpBarcodeData As String
    Private TmpBarcodeTCode As String
    Private TmpBarcodePCode As String

    Private PlcSTring As String
    Private TmrIoCount As Double
    Private PlcREadSTep As Double

#Region "Port"

    Private Sub PortOpen(ByVal tControl As SerialPort, ByVal tPortNumber As String, ByVal Indicator As Label, ByVal tbaudRate As Integer)

        If tPortNumber = "Disabled" Then
            Indicator.BackColor = Color.Black
        Else
            Try
                If tControl.IsOpen() = True Then
                    tControl.Close()
                End If
                tControl.PortName = tPortNumber
                tControl.BaudRate = tbaudRate
                tControl.DataBits = 8
                tControl.Open()
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private _cliTools(3) As Handy2000Client40Vb

    Private Sub EsticStart(portName As String, toolIndex As Integer)
        If toolIndex < 0 OrElse toolIndex > 3 Then Throw New ArgumentOutOfRangeException("toolIndex")

        Try
            ' 기존 인스턴스 있으면 정리
            If _cliTools(toolIndex) IsNot Nothing Then
                _cliTools(toolIndex).Dispose()
                _cliTools(toolIndex) = Nothing
            End If

            Dim cli As New Handy2000Client40Vb()

            ' ======= 설정 (네 코드 기준) =======
            cli.Logger = AddressOf Appendlog
            cli.EnableLogging = False
            cli.EnableProtocolLog = False
            cli.EnableTrafficAscii = False
            cli.EnableTrafficHex = False
            cli.MaxDumpBytes = 0
            cli.DumpRawOnTightening = True
            cli.ShowCompactResult = True
            cli.UseControllerOnly = True
            cli.KeepAliveIntervalMs = 7000
            cli.SubscribeRevision = "900"

            ' ======= 이벤트(통합 핸들러) 연결 =======
            Dim idx As Integer = toolIndex ' 캡처용 지역 변수(중요)
            AddHandler cli.TighteningEvaluated,
            Sub(torqueNm As Double, angleDeg As Double, controllerOk As Boolean, localOk As Boolean,
                judge1 As String, judge2 As String, reason As String, raw As String)
                OnTighteningJudgeUnified(idx, torqueNm, angleDeg, controllerOk, localOk, judge1, judge2, reason, raw)
            End Sub

            ' ======= 연결 및 세션 시작 =======
            cli.ConnectSerial(portName, 9600, Parity.None, 8, StopBits.One)
            cli.StartSession()
            cli.SendMid(1, "001", Nothing)                     ' MID 0001: Comm Start
            cli.SendMid(60, cli.SubscribeRevision, Nothing)    ' MID 0060: Subscribe

            _cliTools(idx) = cli
            Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}] Started on {1}", idx + 1, portName))

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}][ERROR] {1}", toolIndex + 1, ex.Message))
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnTighteningJudgeUnified(toolIndex As Integer,
                                     torqueNm As Double, angleDeg As Double,
                                     controllerOk As Boolean, localOk As Boolean,
                                     judge1 As String, judge2 As String,
                                     reason As String, raw As String)

        ' 공통 로깅(그대로 유지)
        Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}] DEC={1} | TQ={2:0.00}Nm | ANG={3:0.0}° | res={4} batch={5} | {6}",
                            toolIndex + 1,
                            If(controllerOk, "OK", "NG"),
                            torqueNm, angleDeg, judge1, judge2, reason))

        ' ★ 중복 제거: 공통 처리 함수로 위임
        ProcessToolDecision(toolIndex, torqueNm, controllerOk)
    End Sub


    ' -------------------------------------------------------------
    ' 공통 처리 함수 (중복 if-else 4개 → 한 곳에서 처리)
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------
    Private Sub ProcessToolDecision(toolIndex As Integer, torqueNm As Double, controllerOk As Boolean)
        Dim toolNo As Integer = toolIndex + 1                    ' 1..4
        Dim expectedTag As String = "TOOL" & toolNo.ToString()   ' "TOOL1".."TOOL4"

        ' 시퀀스 체크
        If wStep = 202 AndAlso tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains(expectedTag) Then

            Dim dec As String = If(controllerOk, "OK", "NG")
            DisplayGrid(torqueNm.ToString("0.00"), dec, SeqCount)

            If controllerOk Then
                DingDOng()
                wStep = 203
            Else
                NG()
                wStep = 202.1
            End If

        Else
            ' 해당 TOOL 순서가 아닌데 신호가 오면 NG 처리(기존 로직 유지)
            NG()
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub SerialOpen()

        If IOTYPE = "LS PLC RS232" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        ElseIf IOTYPE = "FTECH IOBOARD A" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        ElseIf IOTYPE = "FTECH IOBOARD B" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        End If

        PortOpen(SerialScanner, PortNumberScanner, CwlbScan, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialScanner2, PortNumberScanner2, CwlbScan2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialPrinter, PortNumberPrinter, CwlbPrinter, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialResist, PortNumberResist, CwlbResist, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialResist2, PortNumberResist2, CwlbResist2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialRfid, PortNumberRfid1, CwlbRFID, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialRfid2, PortNumberRfid2, CwlbRFID2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialLaser1, PortNumberLaser1, CwlbLaser1, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialLaser2, PortNumberLaser2, CwlbLaser2, 9600)

        If PortNumberTool1.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool1.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool1, 0)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool2.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool2.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool2, 1)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool3.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool3.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool3, 2)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool4.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool4.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool4, 3)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSQLDB_ReWork()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Tmp = Trim(Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value)
                Tmp = Tmp + 1
                Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value = Tmp
            Catch ex As Exception
                Tmp = "1"
                Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value = Tmp
            End Try

            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        DingDOng()

    End Sub

    ' 폼 멤버(전역)
    Private _scannerSb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private Function IsAsciiAlphaNum(b As Byte) As Boolean
        Return (b >= AscW("0"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("9"c)) _
        OrElse (b >= AscW("A"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("Z"c)) _
        OrElse (b >= AscW("a"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("z"c))
    End Function
    ' 혹시 대비용(최종 문자열 2차 정화) - 필요 시 사용
    Private Function IsAllowedByte(b As Byte) As Boolean
        If (b >= AscW("0"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("9"c)) _
       OrElse (b >= AscW("A"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("Z"c)) _
       OrElse (b >= AscW("a"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("z"c)) Then
            Return True
        End If

        Select Case b
            Case &H1D, &H1E, &H4 ' GS, RS, EOT 포함(허용)
                Return True
            Case AscW("["c), AscW("]"c), AscW("("c), AscW(")"c), AscW("<"c), AscW(">"c) ' 괄호류 포함(허용)
                Return True
            Case Else
                Return False
        End Select
    End Function

    Private ScanMode As String
    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim toRead As Integer = SerialScanner.BytesToRead
            If toRead <= 0 Then Exit Sub

            Dim buf(toRead - 1) As Byte
            Dim readCount As Integer = SerialScanner.Read(buf, 0, buf.Length)

            ' 바이트 단위 처리: LF(0x0A)에서 패킷 종료, CR(0x0D) 및 기타 불허 문자는 버림
            For i As Integer = 0 To readCount - 1
                Dim b As Byte = buf(i)

                If b = &HD Then
                    ' CR 제거
                    Continue For

                ElseIf b = &HA Then
                    ' LF 감지 → 패킷 종료
                    Dim scanData As String = _scannerSb.ToString()
                    _scannerSb.Clear()

                    If scanData.Length > 0 Then
                        FlushPacketToUi(scanData) ' UI 스레드로 전달
                    End If

                Else
                    ' 허용된 문자/제어만 누적 (영문/숫자 + 괄호류 + GS/RS/EOT)
                    If IsAllowedByte(b) Then
                        _scannerSb.Append(ChrW(b))
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            ' 버퍼 폭주 방지
            If _scannerSb.Length > 8192 Then
                Appendlog("Scanner 버퍼 과다 누적 → 초기화")
                _scannerSb.Clear()
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("SerialScanner_DataReceived 오류: " & ex.Message)
            Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & ex.StackTrace)
            _scannerSb.Clear()
            Try : SerialScanner.DiscardInBuffer() : Catch : End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' === 패킷 완성 시 UI 스레드로 안전하게 전달 ===
    Private Sub FlushPacketToUi(ByVal scanData As String)
        If Not Me.IsHandleCreated Then Return
        Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub()
                                 Try
                                     ' 여기서 scanData에는 CR/LF가 제거됨, GS/RS 등은 그대로
                                     srcLbScanner.Text = scanData
                                     gScanData = scanData
                                     Appendlog("Scanner Input-" & scanData)

                                     If wStep = 0.1 Then

                                         If SearchPart(scanData) = True Then wStep = 0.2

                                     ElseIf wStep = 111 Then

                                         If TmpFlagDuplicateCheck(SeqCount) = True Then
                                             If CheckDuplicate(scanData) = False Then
                                                 If scanData.Contains(scanTarget1) = True Or scanData.Contains(scanTarget2) = True Then
                                                     WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "LOG")
                                                     DisplayGrid(scanTarget1, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                     tmpSeqScanData(SeqCount) = scanData
                                                     playScanCompleted()
                                                 Else
                                                     WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                     DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                     NG()
                                                 End If
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG Duplicated" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "Duplicated", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If
                                         Else
                                             If scanData.Contains(scanTarget1) = True Or scanData.Contains(scanTarget2) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanTarget1, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 tmpSeqScanData(SeqCount) = scanData
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If
                                         End If

                                     ElseIf wStep = 141 Then

                                         If LineType = "END" Then
                                             If scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodeTCode) = True And scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodePCode) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeTCode & "/" & TmpBarcodePCode & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeTCode & "/" & TmpBarcodePCode & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If

                                         Else
                                             If scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodeData) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeData & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeData & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If

                                         End If

                                     End If

                                 Catch uiEx As Exception
                                     Appendlog("Scanner UI 처리 오류: " & uiEx.Message)
                                     Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & uiEx.StackTrace)
                                 End Try
                             End Sub, Action))
    End Sub
