    ''' <summary>
    ''' Auto font sizing - adjusts font to fit cell bounds
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Grid1_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs)
        Try
            If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
            If Grid1.Columns.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim colName As String = Grid1.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
            ' Skip image and hidden columns
            If colName = "ColImage" OrElse colName = "ColHidden" Then Return

            Dim cellValue As String = If(e.Value, "").ToString()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cellValue) Then Return

            ' Paint background first
            e.PaintBackground(e.ClipBounds, True)

            ' Cell text area with padding
            Dim cellRect As Rectangle = e.CellBounds
            Dim textRect As New Rectangle(cellRect.X + 4, cellRect.Y + 2, cellRect.Width - 8, cellRect.Height - 4)

            ' Calculate optimal font size
            Dim fontFamily As String = "Arial Narrow"
            Dim fontSize As Single = CalculateFontSize(cellValue, textRect, fontFamily, e.Graphics)

            ' Draw text
            Using font As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim sf As New StringFormat()
                sf.Alignment = StringAlignment.Center
                sf.LineAlignment = StringAlignment.Center

                Dim textColor As Color = If(e.CellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Empty, Color.Black, e.CellStyle.ForeColor)
                Using brush As New SolidBrush(textColor)
                    e.Graphics.DrawString(cellValue, font, brush, textRect, sf)
                End Using
            End Using

            e.Handled = True
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Binary search to find largest font size that fits within rectangle
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function CalculateFontSize(text As String, rect As Rectangle, fontFamily As String, g As Graphics) As Single
        Dim minSize As Single = 12
        Dim maxSize As Single = 50
        Dim fontSize As Single = maxSize

        While maxSize - minSize > 1
            fontSize = (minSize + maxSize) / 2
            Using testFont As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim textSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(text, testFont)
                If textSize.Width <= rect.Width AndAlso textSize.Height <= rect.Height Then
                    minSize = fontSize
                Else
                    maxSize = fontSize
                End If
            End Using
        End While

        Return minSize
    End Function

#Region "Barcode"

    Public Sub BarcodePrint(ByVal strPartno As String, ByVal strPArtName As String, ByVal strSerialNo As String)

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim Tmp As String
        Dim TqString As String = ""
        Dim TmpSize As String

        If LineType = "END" Then

            Tmp =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "2812" & GS &
                "P" & Replace(strPartno, "-", "") & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(strSerialNo, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1JGFB" & "A" & Mid(strSerialNo, 9, 7) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT

            LoadBarcodeData()

            Try
                TmpSize = CStr(CInt(BARCODE_SIZE1) + CInt(BarcodeSizeOffSet))
            Catch ex As Exception
                TmpSize = CStr(CInt(BARCODE_SIZE1))
            End Try

            Appendlog($"출하바코드:{Tmp}")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & BARCODE_X & "," & BARCODE_Y & "^BY5^BXN," & TmpSize & "," & BARCODE_SIZE2 & ",,,,^FH^FD" & Tmp & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & SERIALNO_X & "," & SERIALNO_Y & "^A0N," & SERIALNO_H & "," & SERIALNO_W & "^FD" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNO_X & "," & PARTNO_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNO_H & "," & PARTNO_W & "^FD" & strPartno & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNAME_X & "," & PARTNAME_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNAME_H & "," & PARTNAME_W & "^FD" & strPArtName & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & COMPANY_X & "," & COMPANY_Y & "^A0N," & COMPANY_H & "," & COMPANY_W & "^FD" & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm") & " " & Mid(strSerialNo, 9, 7) & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & LETTER_X & "," & LETTER_Y & "^A0N," & LETTER_H & "," & LETTER_W & "^FD" & TmpPartCode & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & TQ_X & "," & TQ_Y & "^A0N," & TQ_H & "," & TQ_W & "^FD" & TqString & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XZ")

        ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then

            LoadBarcodeData()
            Tmp = strSerialNo
            TmpBarcodeData = Tmp
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & BARCODE_X & "," & BARCODE_Y & "^BQN," & BARCODE_SIZE1 & "," & BARCODE_SIZE2 & "^FDMM,A" & Tmp & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & SERIALNO_X & "," & SERIALNO_Y & "^A0N," & SERIALNO_H & "," & SERIALNO_W & "^FD" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNO_X & "," & PARTNO_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNO_H & "," & PARTNO_W & "^FD" & strPartno & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNAME_X & "," & PARTNAME_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNAME_H & "," & PARTNAME_W & "^FD" & strPArtName & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XZ")

        End If

    End Sub

    Private S40Dec As String
    Private S50Dec As String

    Private Function Dec2Str(Str) As String

        Dim Tmp As String
        Try
            Tmp = Trim(Str)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tmp = "NG"
        End Try
        Return Tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub BarcodePrintNG(ByVal strPartno As String, ByVal strPArtName As String, ByVal strSerialNo As String)

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim TestStr(14) As String
        Dim TestVal(14) As String
        Dim TestTitle(14) As String
        Dim NgString1 As String = ""
        Dim NgString2 As String = ""
        Dim NgString3 As String = ""
        Dim NgString4 As String = ""

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SerialNo = '" & strSerialNo & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            S10Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP10_Decision").Value)
            S20Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP20_Decision").Value)
            S30Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP30_Decision").Value)
            S40Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP40_Decision").Value)
            S50Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP50_Decision").Value)
            S60Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OPTest_Total_Decision").Value)

            TestStr(0) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(1) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(2) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdSpeedDec"
            TestStr(3) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAngleDec"
            TestStr(4) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(5) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(6) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdSpeedDec"
            TestStr(7) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAngleDec"
            TestStr(8) = "OpTest_Recl_EndAngleDec"
            TestStr(9) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(10) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(11) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(12) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(13) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdForceDec"
            TestStr(14) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdForceDec"

            TestVal(0) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAmp"
            TestVal(1) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdNoise"
            TestVal(2) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdSpeed"
            TestVal(3) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAngle"
            TestVal(4) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAmp"
            TestVal(5) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdNoise"
            TestVal(6) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdSpeed"
            TestVal(7) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAngle"
            TestVal(8) = "OpTest_Recl_EndAngle"
            TestVal(9) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdAmp"
            TestVal(10) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdNoise"
            TestVal(11) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdAmp"
            TestVal(12) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdNoise"
            TestVal(13) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdForce"
            TestVal(14) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdForce"

            TestTitle(0) = "R FWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(1) = "R FWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(2) = "R FWD SPEED NG:"
            TestTitle(3) = "R FWD ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(4) = "R BWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(5) = "R BWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(6) = "R BWD SPEED NG:"
            TestTitle(7) = "R BWD ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(8) = "R END ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(9) = "L FWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(10) = "L FWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(11) = "L BWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(12) = "L BWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(13) = "R FWD FORCE NG:"
            TestTitle(14) = "R BWD FORCE NG:"

            For i = 0 To 14
                Try
                    If Rs.Fields(TestStr(i)).Value = "NG" Then
                        NGCount = NGCount + 1
                        If NGCount <= 2 Then
                            NgString1 = NgString1 & " / " & TestTitle(i) & Rs.Fields(TestVal(i)).Value
                        ElseIf NGCount <= 4 And NGCount > 2 Then

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "40" & "," & "40" & "^BQN," & "8" & "," & "7" & "^FDMM,A" & "NG" & strSerialNo & "^FS")

        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "670" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S50 : " & S50Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "250" & "," & "190" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "NOISE TEST : " & S60Dec & "^FS")

        'SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "250" & "," & "190" & "^A0N," & "30" & "," & "20" & "^FD" & NgString1 & "^FS")

    Private Sub ReqResist2()

        End If

    Private Sub TmrResist_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrResist.Tick

        If ResistSEnd1 = False Then ReqResist1()
        If ResistSEnd2 = False Then ReqResist2()

    Private Sub SerialResist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialResist.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim tmpdata As Double
        Dim SplitTmp() As String

        Incoming = SerialResist.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialResist.DiscardInBuffer()

        Try
            ' 2.4400E+00
            If ResistSEnd1 = True Then
                If tmp.Contains("E+00") = True Then
                    SplitTmp = Split(tmp, "E")
                    tmpdata = CDbl(SplitTmp(0))
                ElseIf tmp.Contains("E+30") = True Then
                    tmpdata = -10
                End If
                ResistData1 = tmpdata
            End If
            ResistSEnd1 = False
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmpdata = 0
            ResistSEnd1 = False
        End Try
        ResistSEnd1 = False

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialResist2_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialResist2.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim tmpdata As Double
        Dim SplitTmp() As String

        Incoming = SerialResist2.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialResist2.DiscardInBuffer()

        Try

            If ResistSEnd2 = True Then
                If tmp.Contains("E+00") = True Then
                    SplitTmp = Split(tmp, "E")
                    tmpdata = CDbl(SplitTmp(0))
                ElseIf tmp.Contains("E+30") = True Then
                    tmpdata = -10
                End If
                ResistData2 = tmpdata
            End If
            ResistSEnd2 = False
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmpdata = 0
            ResistSEnd2 = False
        End Try
        ResistSEnd2 = False

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(ByVal strData As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Dim tmpQurry As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where "
        For i = 1 To SeqTotal
            If i = SeqTotal Then
                tmpQurry = tmpQurry & "Job" & CStr(i) & "Value = '" & strData & "'"
            Else
                tmpQurry = tmpQurry & "Job" & CStr(i) & "Value = '" & strData & "' OR "
            End If
        Next
        Rs.Open(tmpQurry, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then tmp = True
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' "4001.0" 또는 "D4001.0" 같은 문자열을 파싱해 워드주소/비트인덱스/디바이스를 뽑는다.
    Private Function TryParseAddressWithBit(ByVal input As String,
                                        ByRef device As String,
                                        ByRef wordAddress As Integer,
                                        ByRef bitIndex As Integer) As Boolean
        device = Nothing
        wordAddress = 0
        bitIndex = 0

        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input) Then Return False

        Dim rx As New Regex("^\s*(?:(?<dev>[A-Za-z]+)\s*)?(?<addr>\d+)(?:\.(?<bit>\d{1,2}))?\s*$")
        Dim m = rx.Match(input)
        If Not m.Success Then Return False

        Dim addrStr As String = m.Groups("addr").Value
        Dim bitStr As String = If(m.Groups("bit").Success, m.Groups("bit").Value, "0")
        Dim devStr As String = If(m.Groups("dev").Success, m.Groups("dev").Value, Nothing)

        If Not Integer.TryParse(addrStr, wordAddress) Then Return False
        If Not Integer.TryParse(bitStr, bitIndex) Then Return False
        If bitIndex < 0 OrElse bitIndex > 15 Then Return False

        device = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(devStr), Nothing, devStr.ToUpperInvariant())
        Return True
    End Function

    ' 문자열 주소("4001.0" 또는 "D4001.0")로 비트 쓰기
    ' defaultDevice: 문자열에 디바이스 문자가 없을 때 사용할 기본 디바이스(예: "D")
    Private Sub WritePlcBitByString(ByVal defaultDevice As String,
                                ByVal addressWithBit As String,
                                ByVal setOn As Boolean)
        Dim dev As String = Nothing
        Dim word As Integer
        Dim bit As Integer

        If Not TryParseAddressWithBit(addressWithBit, dev, word, bit) Then
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBitByString: 주소 파싱 실패 → '{addressWithBit}'")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        ' 문자열에 디바이스가 있으면 그걸 쓰고, 없으면 기본 디바이스 사용
        Dim useDevice As String = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(dev), defaultDevice, dev)

        ' 기존에 만들어 둔 단일 비트 쓰기 함수 호출
        WritePlcBit(useDevice, word, bit, setOn)
    End Sub

    Private Sub SetIO()

        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort1(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort1ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort1(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort1ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort1(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort2(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort2ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort2(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort2ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort2(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort3(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort3ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort3(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort3ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort3(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort4(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort4ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort4(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort4ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort4(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSQLDB()
        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tMP As String = ""

        Try
            If LineType = "START" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "INSERT INTO " & ServerTableName & " (PartNo,PartName,SerialNo," & ServerColumnName & "_Date," & ServerColumnName & "_StartTime," & ServerColumnName & "_EndTime," & ServerColumnName & "_Decision,"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then
                        strSQL = strSQL & "" & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & ","
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"
                strSQL = strSQL & " VALUES (" & "'" & srcLbPartNo.Text & "','" & srcLbPartName.Text & "','" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "','" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "','" & StartTime & "','" & EndTime & "','" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then
                        If tmpSeqType(i - 1).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i - 1) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text & "',"
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")
                SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
                ConnectionCloseSQL()

            ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "UPDATE " & ServerTableName & " SET " &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Date" & " = " & "'" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_StartTime" & " = " & "'" & StartTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_EndTime" & " = " & "'" & EndTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Decision" & " = " & "'" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i - 1) = True Then

                        If tmpSeqType(i - 1).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & " = " & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i - 1) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i - 1) & " = " & "'" & Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text & "',"
                        End If

                    End If
                Next

                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & " "
                strSQL = strSQL & "WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")
                SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
                ConnectionCloseSQL()
            End If

            wStep = 1002.2

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("SaveSQLDB 오류 발생: " & ex.Message)
            Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & ex.StackTrace)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function SearchPart(ByVal strScanRead As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim strSql As String

        ConnectionOpenSQL()

        Try
            ' 검색 조건: OR 로 연결
            strSql = "HeadBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR FrameBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR MotorBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR LsuptBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR SabBarcode1 = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR SabBarcode2 = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR HarnessBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' "

            ' Recordset 옵션
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Dim Query As String = "SELECT TOP 1 * FROM Table_Main " &
                "WHERE (" & strSql & ") ORDER BY ID DESC"
            ' SQL 실행: ID 가장 큰 레코드만 1건 반환
            Rs.Open(Query, SqlConnect)

            Appendlog(Query)
            Appendlog($"RecordCount: {Rs.RecordCount}")

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                srcLbPartName.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
                srcLbPartNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
                srcLbSerialNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("SerialNo").Value)
                tmp = True
                Appendlog("가장 최근 ID 레코드 반환 성공")
            Else
                tmp = False
                Appendlog("검색 결과 없음")
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()

            Return tmp

        Catch ex As Exception

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            Appendlog("SearchPart 오류: " & ex.Message)
            Return False
        End Try

    End Function

                SeqInPort3(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                SeqInPort4(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)

                SeqInPort2State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                SeqInPort3State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)

                SeqOutPort2(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)

                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "")
                ElseIf tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") = True Then
                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &
                              Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "" & Chr(9) &
                              "")
                Else
                    Grid1.AddItem(CStr(i + 1) & Chr(9) &

                              Rs.Fields("Target").Value & Chr(9) &

                Grid1.Cell(i + 1, 4).Font = New Font("Arial Narrow", 30, FontStyle.Bold)

                Catch ex As Exception

                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        SeqTotal = Rs.RecordCount
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        wStep = 11

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 시나리오 진행상황 업데이트 - 완료수량 증가, 목표달성시 다음순번으로 이동
    ''' 첫 번째 공정(OP10)에서만 카운트 증가하도록 수정 (2025-12-19)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub UpdateScenarioProgress()
        ' 첫 번째 공정(OP10)에서만 시나리오 진행 업데이트 - 중복 카운트 방지
        If ServerColumnName <> "OP10" Then Exit Sub

        Try
            ConnectionOpenSQL()

            ' 현재 진행중인 시나리오의 상세 완료수량 +1 업데이트
            Dim strSQL As String = "UPDATE d SET d.CompletedQty = d.CompletedQty + 1 " &
                "FROM Table_Scenario_Detail d " &
                "INNER JOIN Table_Scenario s ON d.ScenarioID = s.ScenarioID AND d.Seq = s.CurrentSeq " &
                "WHERE s.Status = 'IN_PROGRESS'"
            SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)

            ' 목표수량 달성 여부 확인 및 다음 순번으로 이동
            strSQL = "DECLARE @ScenarioID INT, @CurrentSeq INT, @MaxSeq INT " &
                "SELECT @ScenarioID = s.ScenarioID, @CurrentSeq = s.CurrentSeq " &
                "FROM Table_Scenario s WHERE s.Status = 'IN_PROGRESS' " &
                "IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Table_Scenario_Detail WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq AND CompletedQty >= TargetQty) " &
                "BEGIN " &
                "   UPDATE Table_Scenario_Detail SET Status = 'COMPLETED', EndTime = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq " &
                "   SELECT @MaxSeq = MAX(Seq) FROM Table_Scenario_Detail WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "   IF @CurrentSeq < @MaxSeq " &
                "   BEGIN " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario SET CurrentSeq = CurrentSeq + 1, ModifyDate = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario_Detail SET Status = 'IN_PROGRESS', StartTime = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq + 1 " &
                "   END " &
                "   ELSE " &
                "   BEGIN " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario SET Status = 'COMPLETED', ModifyDate = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "   END " &
                "END"
            SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)

            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            Appendlog("Scenario Progress Updated")
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("UpdateScenarioProgress Error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function GetMaxMainRowNum() As Integer

        Dim tmpMaxNum As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                If tmpMaxNum < CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value) Then
                    tmpMaxNum = CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
                End If
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        Return tmpMaxNum

    End Function
    Private Function ParseWord(ByVal input As String) As Integer
        Dim word As Integer = 0
        Dim bit As Integer = 0
        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
        If parts.Length = 2 Then
            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
        Else
            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
            bit = 0
        End If
        Return word
    End Function
    Private Function ParseBit(ByVal input As String) As Integer
        Dim word As Integer = 0
        Dim bit As Integer = 0
        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
        If parts.Length = 2 Then
            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
        Else
            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
            bit = 0
        End If
        Return bit
    End Function
    Private Function CheckIO() As Boolean
        Dim tmpIoCheck As Boolean = True
        Dim Word As Integer
        Dim Bit As Integer

        ' 포트1 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort1(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트2 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort2(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort2State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort2State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트3 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort3(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트4 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort4(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        Return tmpIoCheck

    End Function

    Private Function CheckIO_Or()

        Dim tmpIoCheck As Boolean
        Dim tmpIoCheck1 As Boolean = True
        Dim tmpIoCheck2 As Boolean = True
        Dim tmpIoCheck3 As Boolean = True

        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort2(SeqCount)) = True Then

                    tmpIoCheck2 = False

                Else

        Else
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort3(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))) = 1 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck3 = False
                End If
            ElseIf SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))) = 0 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck3 = False
                End If
            End If
        Else

        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort4(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))) = 1 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck4 = False

            ElseIf SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))) = 0 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck4 = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
        End If

        If tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Then
            tmpIoCheck = True
        End If
        Return tmpIoCheck

    End Function

    Private Sub ConnectPlc()

        ActPlc.ActCpuType = 210
        ActPlc.ActHostAddress = PlcIpAddress
        If ActPlc.Open <> 0 Then
            FlagPlcConnection = False
            Appendlog("ConnectPLc Fail")
        Else
            Appendlog("ConnectPLc Success")
            FlagPlcConnection = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub ReadPlcMelsec(ByVal startInAddress As Integer, ByVal InDataNumber As Integer,
                          ByVal startOutAddress As Integer, ByVal OutDataNumber As Integer)

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              ' Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         ' List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         ' Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               ' Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  ' Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = InDataNumber + OutDataNumber

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        ' 입력 주소 문자열 구성
        For i = 0 To InDataNumber - 1
            szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startInAddress + i) & vbLf
        Next
        ' 출력 주소 문자열 구성
        For i = 0 To OutDataNumber - 1
            If i = OutDataNumber - 1 Then
                szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startOutAddress + i)
            Else
                szDeviceName &= "D" & CStr(startOutAddress + i) & vbLf
            End If
        Next

        Try
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exException As Exception
                ' Exception processing
                MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                Exit Sub
            End Try

            ' When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded
            If iReturnCode = 0 Then
                ' Copy the read data to the 'szarrData'
                For iNumber = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                    szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
                Next iNumber

                ' 입력 영역 저장
                For i = 0 To InDataNumber - 1
                    Dim wordVal As Integer = sharrDeviceValue(i)
                    IoInput(i + startInAddress) = wordVal
                    ' 비트 분리
                    For b As Integer = 0 To 15
                        IoInputBit(i + startInAddress, b) = ((wordVal >> b) And 1) = 1
                    Next
                Next

                ' 출력 영역 저장
                For i = 0 To OutDataNumber - 1
                    Dim wordVal As Integer = sharrDeviceValue(i + InDataNumber)
                    IoInput(i + startOutAddress) = wordVal
                    ' 비트 분리
                    For b As Integer = 0 To 15
                        IoInputBit(i + startOutAddress, b) = ((wordVal >> b) And 1) = 1
                    Next
                Next

                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            '필요하면 로깅
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub WritePlcMelsec(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then

            ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

            For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
                szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "00000")
                'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
                If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
                sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
            Next
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exception As Exception
                'Exception processing
                'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                FlagPlcConnection = False
                Exit Sub
            End Try

        End If

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
    Public Sub WritePlcBit(ByVal strChr As String,
                        ByVal wordAddress As Integer,
                        ByVal bitIndex As Integer,
                        ByVal setOn As Boolean)

        If bitIndex < 0 OrElse bitIndex > 15 Then
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: bitIndex 범위 오류 ({bitIndex})")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        If PlcConnectionError <> "OK" Then
            Appendlog("WritePlcBit: PLC 연결 상태가 OK가 아닙니다.")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer
        Dim szDeviceName As String = strChr & Format(wordAddress, "00000")
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short = New Short(0) {}

        Try
            ' 1) 현재 워드 읽기
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If iReturnCode <> 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Read 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
                Exit Sub
            End If

            ' 2) 비트 수정
            Dim wordVal As Integer = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(0)) And &HFFFF
            Dim mask As Integer = (1 << bitIndex)
            If setOn Then
                wordVal = wordVal Or mask
            Else
                wordVal = wordVal And Not mask
            End If
            sharrDeviceValue(0) = CShort(wordVal And &HFFFF)
            'Appendlog($"DeviceValue : [{sharrDeviceValue(0).ToString}]")

            ' 3) 되쓰기
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If iReturnCode = 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
                'Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Write 성공[{wordAddress.ToString}][{bitIndex.ToString}][{setOn.ToString}]")
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBit: Write 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBit 예외: {ex.Message}")
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub WritePlcBits(ByVal strChr As String,
                         ByVal wordAddress As Integer,
                         ByVal bit As Boolean)

        If PlcConnectionError <> "OK" Then
            Appendlog("WritePlcBits: PLC 연결 상태가 OK가 아닙니다.") ' 필요시 Appendlog 로 바꾸세요
            Exit Sub
        End If

        Dim szDeviceName As String = strChr & Format(wordAddress, "00000")
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short = New Short(0) {}

        ' True면 0xFFFF(-1), False면 0x0000
        Dim val As UShort = If(bit, UShort.MaxValue, CUShort(0))
        sharrDeviceValue(0) = CShort(val)  ' MX는 Short로 전달

        Try
            Dim rc As Integer = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, sharrDeviceValue(0))
            If rc = 0 Then
                PlcConnectionError = "OK"
            Else
                PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(rc)
                Appendlog($"WritePlcBits: Write 실패 RC=0x{PlcConnectionError}")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBits 예외: {ex.Message}")
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private pollingThread As Thread
    Private pollingStop As Boolean = False
    Private First As Boolean = True
    Private Sub TimerPlcConnect_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles TimerPlcConnect.Tick

        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
            AxcPlcErr.BackColor = Color.Blue
            If First = True Then
                WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, False)
                WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, False)
                First = False
            End If
        Else
            AxcPlcErr.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

        If PlcConnectionStep = 0 Then
            ConnectPlc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 2
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 2 Then
            If FlagPlcConnection = True Then
                PlcConnectionStep = 3
            Else
                PlcConnectionStep = 0
            End If
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 3 Then
            PlcConnectionError = ""
            ReadPlcMelsec(PlcInSignalStartAddress, 3, PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2)
            PlcConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 4 Then
            If PlcConnectionError <> "" Then
                If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
                    PlcConnectionStep = 2
                Else
                    ActPlc.Close()
                    PlcConnectionStep = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub SerialtoPC_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialtoPC.DataReceived
        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim RecvData As String
        Incoming = SerialtoPC.ReadLine()
        RecvData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialtoPC.DiscardInBuffer()

        Try
            If Len(RecvData) = 11 Then
                If wStep >= 2 Then
                    InitControl()
                    StrPart = RecvData
                    wStep = 2.3
                End If
            ElseIf Len(RecvData) = 23 Then
                If wStep = 1 Then
                    srcLbSerialNo.Text = RecvData
                    wStep = 2.8
                End If
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    Private Sub ThreadRfidRecv()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = SerialRfid.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Dec2Hex(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then
                    If sRecvData.Length = 28 Then
                        If Mid(sRecvData, 11, 1) = "E" Then
                            srcLbRFID1.Text = Mid(sRecvData, 11, 16)
                        Else
                            srcLbRFID1.Text = "Empty"
                        End If
                    Else
                        srcLbRFID1.Text = "Empty"
                    End If
                    sRecvData = ""
                    SerialRfid.DiscardInBuffer()
                    RfidStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
            Thread.Sleep(10)
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)
        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            ' ★ 비동기: UI가 바쁠 땐 큐에만 넣고 즉시 리턴 -> 수신 스레드가 안 막힘
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' 실제 UI 업데이트
        TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ToolEnabled()
        For i As Integer = 0 To 3
            Dim cli = _cliTools(i)
            If cli Is Nothing Then
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}] Not started. Skip enable.")
                Continue For
            End If
            Try
                cli.SetToolEnabled(True)   ' 내부에서 EnableTool 호출 + DesiredToolEnabled 동기화
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}] Enable command sent.")
            Catch ex As Exception
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}][ERROR] Enable: {ex.Message}")
            End Try
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub ToolDisabled()
        For i As Integer = 0 To 3
            Dim cli = _cliTools(i)
            If cli Is Nothing Then
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}] Not started. Skip disable.")
                Continue For
            End If
            Try
                cli.SetToolEnabled(False)  ' 내부에서 DisableTool 호출 + DesiredToolEnabled 동기화
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}] Disable command sent.")
            Catch ex As Exception
                Appendlog($"[TOOL{i + 1}][ERROR] Disable: {ex.Message}")
            End Try
        Next
    End Sub

#Region "BiosLock"

    Public ReadOnly bBiosMake As Boolean = True

    Private Sub BiosLock()

        Try
            Dim mbInfo As String = String.Empty
            Dim scope As ManagementScope = New ManagementScope("\\" & Environment.MachineName & "\root\cimv2")
            scope.Connect()
            Dim wmiClass As ManagementObject = New ManagementObject(scope, New ManagementPath("Win32_BaseBoard.Tag=""Base Board"""), New ObjectGetOptions())

            For Each propData As PropertyData In wmiClass.Properties
                If propData.Name = "SerialNumber" Then mbInfo = Convert.ToString(propData.Value)
            Next
            'FTECH는 비번
            Dim sEncrypt As String = Encrypt(mbInfo, "FTECH")
            sEncrypt = RemoveSpecialCharacters(sEncrypt)
            Dim sPath As String = Path.GetPathRoot(System.Environment.CurrentDirectory) & sEncrypt & ".lock"

            'lincense file 생성(*라이센스파일 경로 : C:\파일명.lock)
            'If bBiosMake Then
            '    If Not File.Exists(sPath) Then
            '        File.Create(sPath)
            '        MessageBox.Show("라이센스 생성 완료", "Complete")
            '        System.Environment.[Exit](0)
            '    End If
            'End If

            'lincense file 비교
            If Not File.Exists(sPath) Then
                MessageBox.Show("Need Licence.", "Error")
                System.Environment.[Exit](0)
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error : " & ex.ToString, "Error")
            System.Environment.[Exit](0)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Public Shared Function Decrypt(ByVal textToDecrypt As String, ByVal key As String) As String
        Dim rijndaelCipher As RijndaelManaged = New RijndaelManaged()
        rijndaelCipher.Mode = CipherMode.CBC
        rijndaelCipher.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7
        rijndaelCipher.KeySize = 128
        rijndaelCipher.BlockSize = 128
        Dim encryptedData As Byte() = Convert.FromBase64String(textToDecrypt)
        Dim pwdBytes As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key)
        Dim keyBytes As Byte() = New Byte(15) {}
        Dim len As Integer = pwdBytes.Length

        If len > keyBytes.Length Then
            len = keyBytes.Length
        End If

        Array.Copy(pwdBytes, keyBytes, len)
        rijndaelCipher.Key = keyBytes
        rijndaelCipher.IV = keyBytes
        Dim plainText As Byte() = rijndaelCipher.CreateDecryptor().TransformFinalBlock(encryptedData, 0, encryptedData.Length)
        Return Encoding.UTF8.GetString(plainText)
    End Function

    Public Shared Function Encrypt(ByVal textToEncrypt As String, ByVal key As String) As String
        Dim rijndaelCipher As RijndaelManaged = New RijndaelManaged()
        rijndaelCipher.Mode = CipherMode.CBC
        rijndaelCipher.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7
        rijndaelCipher.KeySize = 128
        rijndaelCipher.BlockSize = 128
        Dim pwdBytes As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(key)
        Dim keyBytes As Byte() = New Byte(15) {}
        Dim len As Integer = pwdBytes.Length

        If len > keyBytes.Length Then
            len = keyBytes.Length
        End If

        Array.Copy(pwdBytes, keyBytes, len)
        rijndaelCipher.Key = keyBytes
        rijndaelCipher.IV = keyBytes
        Dim transform As ICryptoTransform = rijndaelCipher.CreateEncryptor()
        Dim plainText As Byte() = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(textToEncrypt)
        Return Convert.ToBase64String(transform.TransformFinalBlock(plainText, 0, plainText.Length))
    End Function

    Public Shared Function RemoveSpecialCharacters(ByVal str As String) As String
        Dim buffer As Char() = New Char(str.Length - 1) {}
        Dim idx As Integer = 0

        For Each c As Char In str

            If (c >= "0"c AndAlso c <= "9"c) OrElse (c >= "A"c AndAlso c <= "Z"c) OrElse (c >= "a"c AndAlso c <= "z"c) OrElse (c = "."c) OrElse (c = "_"c) Then
                buffer(idx) = c
                idx += 1
            End If
        Next

        Return New String(buffer, 0, idx)
    End Function

#Region "Port"

    Private Sub PortOpen(ByVal tControl As SerialPort, ByVal tPortNumber As String, ByVal Indicator As Label, ByVal tbaudRate As Integer)

        If tPortNumber = "Disabled" Then
            Indicator.BackColor = Color.Black
        Else
            Try
                If tControl.IsOpen() = True Then
                    tControl.Close()
                End If
                tControl.PortName = tPortNumber
                tControl.BaudRate = tbaudRate
                tControl.DataBits = 8
                tControl.Open()
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private _cliTools(3) As Handy2000Client40Vb

    Private Sub EsticStart(portName As String, toolIndex As Integer)
        If toolIndex < 0 OrElse toolIndex > 3 Then Throw New ArgumentOutOfRangeException("toolIndex")

        Try
            ' 기존 인스턴스 있으면 정리
            If _cliTools(toolIndex) IsNot Nothing Then
                _cliTools(toolIndex).Dispose()
                _cliTools(toolIndex) = Nothing
            End If

            Dim cli As New Handy2000Client40Vb()

            ' ======= 설정 (네 코드 기준) =======
            cli.Logger = AddressOf Appendlog
            cli.EnableLogging = False
            cli.EnableProtocolLog = False
            cli.EnableTrafficAscii = False
            cli.EnableTrafficHex = False
            cli.MaxDumpBytes = 0
            cli.DumpRawOnTightening = True
            cli.ShowCompactResult = True
            cli.UseControllerOnly = True
            cli.KeepAliveIntervalMs = 7000
            cli.SubscribeRevision = "900"

            ' ======= 이벤트(통합 핸들러) 연결 =======
            Dim idx As Integer = toolIndex ' 캡처용 지역 변수(중요)
            AddHandler cli.TighteningEvaluated,
            Sub(torqueNm As Double, angleDeg As Double, controllerOk As Boolean, localOk As Boolean,
                judge1 As String, judge2 As String, reason As String, raw As String)
                OnTighteningJudgeUnified(idx, torqueNm, angleDeg, controllerOk, localOk, judge1, judge2, reason, raw)
            End Sub

            ' ======= 연결 및 세션 시작 =======
            cli.ConnectSerial(portName, 9600, Parity.None, 8, StopBits.One)
            cli.StartSession()
            cli.SendMid(1, "001", Nothing)                     ' MID 0001: Comm Start
            cli.SendMid(60, cli.SubscribeRevision, Nothing)    ' MID 0060: Subscribe

            _cliTools(idx) = cli
            Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}] Started on {1}", idx + 1, portName))

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}][ERROR] {1}", toolIndex + 1, ex.Message))
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnTighteningJudgeUnified(toolIndex As Integer,
                                     torqueNm As Double, angleDeg As Double,
                                     controllerOk As Boolean, localOk As Boolean,
                                     judge1 As String, judge2 As String,
                                     reason As String, raw As String)

        ' 공통 로깅(그대로 유지)
        Appendlog(String.Format("[TOOL{0}] DEC={1} | TQ={2:0.00}Nm | ANG={3:0.0}° | res={4} batch={5} | {6}",
                            toolIndex + 1,
                            If(controllerOk, "OK", "NG"),
                            torqueNm, angleDeg, judge1, judge2, reason))

        ' ★ 중복 제거: 공통 처리 함수로 위임
        ProcessToolDecision(toolIndex, torqueNm, controllerOk)
    End Sub


    ' -------------------------------------------------------------
    ' 공통 처리 함수 (중복 if-else 4개 → 한 곳에서 처리)
    ' -------------------------------------------------------------
    Private Sub ProcessToolDecision(toolIndex As Integer, torqueNm As Double, controllerOk As Boolean)
        Dim toolNo As Integer = toolIndex + 1                    ' 1..4
        Dim expectedTag As String = "TOOL" & toolNo.ToString()   ' "TOOL1".."TOOL4"

        ' 시퀀스 체크
        If wStep = 202 AndAlso tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains(expectedTag) Then

            Dim dec As String = If(controllerOk, "OK", "NG")
            DisplayGrid(torqueNm.ToString("0.00"), dec, SeqCount)

            If controllerOk Then
                DingDOng()
                wStep = 203
            Else
                NG()
                wStep = 202.1
            End If

        Else
            ' 해당 TOOL 순서가 아닌데 신호가 오면 NG 처리(기존 로직 유지)
            NG()
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub SerialOpen()

        If IOTYPE = "LS PLC RS232" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        ElseIf IOTYPE = "FTECH IOBOARD A" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        ElseIf IOTYPE = "FTECH IOBOARD B" Then
            PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        End If

        PortOpen(SerialScanner, PortNumberScanner, CwlbScan, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialScanner2, PortNumberScanner2, CwlbScan2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialPrinter, PortNumberPrinter, CwlbPrinter, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, CwlbIO, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialResist, PortNumberResist, CwlbResist, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialResist2, PortNumberResist2, CwlbResist2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialRfid, PortNumberRfid1, CwlbRFID, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialRfid2, PortNumberRfid2, CwlbRFID2, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialLaser1, PortNumberLaser1, CwlbLaser1, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialLaser2, PortNumberLaser2, CwlbLaser2, 9600)

        If PortNumberTool1.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool1.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool1, 0)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool2.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool2.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool2, 1)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool3.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool3.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool3, 2)
        End If
        If PortNumberTool4.ToUpper <> "DISABLED" Then
            CwlbTool4.BackColor = Color.DarkBlue
            EsticStart(PortNumberTool4, 3)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSQLDB_ReWork()

        Dim Tmp As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Tmp = Trim(Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value)
                Tmp = Tmp + 1
                Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value = Tmp
            Catch ex As Exception
                Tmp = "1"
                Rs.Fields("ReWork").Value = Tmp
            End Try

            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        DingDOng()

    End Sub

    ' 폼 멤버(전역)
    Private _scannerSb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private Function IsAsciiAlphaNum(b As Byte) As Boolean
        Return (b >= AscW("0"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("9"c)) _
        OrElse (b >= AscW("A"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("Z"c)) _
        OrElse (b >= AscW("a"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("z"c))
    End Function
    ' 혹시 대비용(최종 문자열 2차 정화) - 필요 시 사용
    Private Function IsAllowedByte(b As Byte) As Boolean
        If (b >= AscW("0"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("9"c)) _
       OrElse (b >= AscW("A"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("Z"c)) _
       OrElse (b >= AscW("a"c) AndAlso b <= AscW("z"c)) Then
            Return True
        End If

        Select Case b
            Case &H1D, &H1E, &H4 ' GS, RS, EOT 포함(허용)
                Return True
            Case AscW("["c), AscW("]"c), AscW("("c), AscW(")"c), AscW("<"c), AscW(">"c) ' 괄호류 포함(허용)
                Return True
            Case Else
                Return False
        End Select
    End Function

    Private ScanMode As String
    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim toRead As Integer = SerialScanner.BytesToRead
            If toRead <= 0 Then Exit Sub

            Dim buf(toRead - 1) As Byte
            Dim readCount As Integer = SerialScanner.Read(buf, 0, buf.Length)

            ' 바이트 단위 처리: LF(0x0A)에서 패킷 종료, CR(0x0D) 및 기타 불허 문자는 버림
            For i As Integer = 0 To readCount - 1
                Dim b As Byte = buf(i)

                If b = &HD Then
                    ' CR 제거
                    Continue For

                ElseIf b = &HA Then
                    ' LF 감지 → 패킷 종료
                    Dim scanData As String = _scannerSb.ToString()
                    _scannerSb.Clear()

                    If scanData.Length > 0 Then
                        FlushPacketToUi(scanData) ' UI 스레드로 전달
                    End If

                Else
                    ' 허용된 문자/제어만 누적 (영문/숫자 + 괄호류 + GS/RS/EOT)
                    If IsAllowedByte(b) Then
                        _scannerSb.Append(ChrW(b))
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            ' 버퍼 폭주 방지
            If _scannerSb.Length > 8192 Then
                Appendlog("Scanner 버퍼 과다 누적 → 초기화")
                _scannerSb.Clear()
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("SerialScanner_DataReceived 오류: " & ex.Message)
            Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & ex.StackTrace)
            _scannerSb.Clear()
            Try : SerialScanner.DiscardInBuffer() : Catch : End Try
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' === 패킷 완성 시 UI 스레드로 안전하게 전달 ===
    Private Sub FlushPacketToUi(ByVal scanData As String)
        If Not Me.IsHandleCreated Then Return
        Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub()
                                 Try
                                     ' 여기서 scanData에는 CR/LF가 제거됨, GS/RS 등은 그대로
                                     srcLbScanner.Text = scanData
                                     gScanData = scanData
                                     Appendlog("Scanner Input-" & scanData)

                                     If wStep = 0.1 Then

                                         If SearchPart(scanData) = True Then wStep = 0.2

                                     ElseIf wStep = 111 Then

                                         If TmpFlagDuplicateCheck(SeqCount) = True Then
                                             If CheckDuplicate(scanData) = False Then
                                                 If scanData.Contains(scanTarget1) = True Or scanData.Contains(scanTarget2) = True Then
                                                     WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "LOG")
                                                     DisplayGrid(scanTarget1, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                     tmpSeqScanData(SeqCount) = scanData
                                                     playScanCompleted()
                                                 Else
                                                     WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                     DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                     NG()
                                                 End If
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG Duplicated" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "Duplicated", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If
                                         Else
                                             If scanData.Contains(scanTarget1) = True Or scanData.Contains(scanTarget2) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanTarget1, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 tmpSeqScanData(SeqCount) = scanData
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "PartNo" & srcLbPartNo.Text & vbTab & "Target:" & tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) & vbTab & "Input:" & scanData, "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If
                                         End If

                                     ElseIf wStep = 141 Then

                                         If LineType = "END" Then
                                             If scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodeTCode) = True And scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodePCode) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeTCode & "/" & TmpBarcodePCode & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeTCode & "/" & TmpBarcodePCode & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If

                                         Else
                                             If scanData.Contains(TmpBarcodeData) = True Then
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner OK" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeData & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "LOG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "OK", SeqCount)
                                                 playScanCompleted()
                                             Else
                                                 WriteLog("Scanner NG" & vbTab & "Target:-" & TmpBarcodeData & "-" & vbTab & "Input:" & "-" & scanData & "-", "NG")
                                                 DisplayGrid(scanData, "NG", SeqCount)
                                                 NG()
                                             End If

                                         End If

                                     End If

                                 Catch uiEx As Exception
                                     Appendlog("Scanner UI 처리 오류: " & uiEx.Message)
                                     Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & uiEx.StackTrace)
                                 End Try
                             End Sub, Action))
    End Sub

    Private Sub ReadRFiD()

        'If SerialRfid.IsOpen = True Then SerialRfid.WriteLine(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H2B) & Chr(&HD) & Chr(&HA))

        If SerialRfid.IsOpen = True Then
            SerialRfid.Write(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H0) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&H7) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&HE8) & Chr(&H3))
            'SerialRfid.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

        ' [2024-12-23 검토] Chr() 함수 문법 오류 가능성
        ' 현재: Chr("&H02") - 문자열을 인자로 전달 (잘못된 문법)
        ' 수정안: Chr(&H02) - 따옴표 없이 16진수 전달 (올바른 문법)
        ' 수정 코드:
        'SerialRfid.Write(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H0) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&H7) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&HE8) & Chr(&H3))

    End Sub

    ' RFID 리셋 명령 (ABx Fast Protocol - 0x35)
    Private Sub ResetRFiD()
        If SerialRfid.IsOpen = True Then
            SerialRfid.Write(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H35) & Chr(&H3))
        End If
    End Sub

    ' RFID2 읽기 명령
    Private Sub ReadRFiD2()
        If SerialRfid2.IsOpen = True Then
            SerialRfid2.Write(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H0) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&H7) & Chr(&H3) & Chr(&HE8) & Chr(&H3))
        End If
    End Sub

    ' RFID2 리셋 명령 (ABx Fast Protocol - 0x35)
    Private Sub ResetRFiD2()
        If SerialRfid2.IsOpen = True Then
            SerialRfid2.Write(Chr(&H2) & Chr(&H35) & Chr(&H3))
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPallet(ByVal StrRFID1 As String, ByVal StrRFID2 As String)

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        ' PalletID1 = StrRFID1 or StrRFID2 이거나, PalletID2 = StrRFID1 or StrRFID2 (둘 중 하나만 만족해도 됨)
        Dim sql As String = $"SELECT * FROM Table_Pallet
                              WHERE PalletID1 IN ('{StrRFID1}', '{StrRFID2}')
                                 OR PalletID2 IN ('{StrRFID1}', '{StrRFID2}')"
        Rs.Open(sql, SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Try
                srcLbSerialNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value)
                If Len(srcLbSerialNo.Text) > 20 Then
                    wStep = 2.8
                Else
                    wStep = 2.81
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                wStep = 2.81
            End Try
        Else
            wStep = 2.81
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SavePallet_OP10(ByVal StrRFID1 As String, ByVal StrRFID2 As String, ByVal strSErial As String, nextSTep As Double)

        wStep = wStep + 0.001
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        ' 조건1: StrRFID1=PalletID1 AND StrRFID2=PalletID2
        ' 조건2: StrRFID1=PalletID2 AND StrRFID2=PalletID1 (반대)
        Dim sql As String = $"SELECT * FROM Table_Pallet
                              WHERE (PalletID1 = '{StrRFID1}' AND PalletID2 = '{StrRFID2}')
                                 OR (PalletID1 = '{StrRFID2}' AND PalletID2 = '{StrRFID1}')"
        Rs.Open(sql, SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            ' 기존 레코드 업데이트
            Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSErial
            Rs.Update()
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
            ' 새 레코드 추가
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("PalletID1").Value = StrRFID1
            Rs.Fields("PalletID2").Value = StrRFID2
            Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSErial
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        wStep = nextSTep

    End Sub


    Private Sub SavePallet(ByVal StrRFID As String, ByVal strSErial As String, nextSTep As Double)

        wStep = wStep + 0.001
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        'Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Pallet WHERE PalletID = '" & StrRFID & "'", SqlConnect)
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Pallet WHERE PalletID Like '%" & StrRFID & "%'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = StrRFID
            Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSErial
            Rs.Update()
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("PalletID").Value = StrRFID
            Rs.Fields("SerialNumber").Value = strSErial
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        wStep = nextSTep

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckRework() As Boolean

        Dim Tmp As Boolean = True
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Try
                If Rs.Fields(ServerColumnName & "_DECISION").Value = "OK" Then
                    Tmp = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        Return Tmp

    End Function

    Private tmpFlagLaserDec2 As Boolean

    Private tmpLengthTestMin As Double

    Private FlagWireMode2 As Boolean = False
