    Private Sub TmrWork_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrWork.Tick

        CheckResetTriggers()

        If cellStep = 0 Then CellReq()

        LsrCount = LsrCount + 0.1
        If LsrCount > 0.3 Then
            If SerialLaser1.IsOpen = True Then SerialLaser1.Write("MS" & vbCrLf)
            If SerialLaser2.IsOpen = True Then SerialLaser2.Write("MS" & vbCrLf)
            If SerialLaser3.IsOpen = True Then SerialLaser3.Write("MS" & vbCrLf)
            LsrCount = 0
        End If

        Try
            axcSrcStateStep.Text = "St:" & wStep

            ' RFID1 읽기
            RfidReadCount1 = RfidReadCount1 + 0.2
            If RfidReadCount1 > 0.4 Then
                If FLagRfid1 = True Then
                    If RfidStep1 = 0 Then
                        ReadRFiD()
                        RfidStep1 = 1
                    End If
                End If
                RfidReadCount1 = 0
            End If

            ' RFID2 읽기
            RfidReadCount2 = RfidReadCount2 + 0.2
            If RfidReadCount2 > 0.4 Then
                If FLagRfid2 = True Then
                    If RfidStep2 = 0 Then
                        ReadRFiD2()
                        RfidStep2 = 1
                    End If
                End If
                RfidReadCount2 = 0
            End If

            TmrwCount = TmrwCount + 1
            If TmrwCount = 10 Then
                WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 0, True)
            ElseIf TmrwCount = 20 Then
                WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 0, False)
                TmrwCount = 0
            End If

            If RstStep = 0 Then

                If IoInputBit(PlcInSignalStartAddress + 1, 4) = True And wStep <> 0 Then
                    WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, False)
                    WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, False)
                    InitControl()
                    Appendlog($"All Output set False")
                    Appendlog($"All Clear")
                    wStep = 0
                End If

                If wStep = 0 Then 'Pallet In

                    If IoInputBit(PlcInSignalStartAddress + 1, 10) = True Then
                        If IoInputBit(PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 1) = True Or
                           IoInputBit(PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2) = True Then
                            WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, False)
                            WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, False)
                        End If
                    End If

                    If IoInputBit(PlcInSignalStartAddress + 1, 1) = True Then
                        WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, False)
                        WritePlcBits("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, False)

                        FLagRfid1 = True
                        FLagRfid2 = True
                        RfidStep1 = 0
                        RfidStep2 = 0
                        RfidCount1 = 0
                        RfidCount2 = 0
                        InitGrid()
                        InitControl()
                        srcLbRFID1.Text = ""
                        srcLbRFID2.Text = ""
                        TextBox1.Text = ""
                        If LineType = "END" Then
                            wStep = 0.1
                        Else
                            wStep = 1
                        End If
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 0.1 Then 'END

                ElseIf wStep = 0.2 Then '스캔완료

                    wStep = 4

                ElseIf wStep = 1 Then 'Rfid Read Start

                    FLagRfid1 = True
                    FLagRfid2 = True
                    RfidStep1 = 0
                    RfidStep2 = 0
                    wStep = 1.1

                ElseIf wStep = 1.1 Then

                    RfidCount1 = RfidCount1 + 0.1
                    If RfidCount1 > 200 Then
                        Appendlog("TRY RFID READ")
                        wStep = 1.11
                    End If

                    If ServerColumnName = "OP10" Then

                        If srcLbRFID1.Text.Length >= 16 And srcLbRFID2.Text.Length >= 16 Then
                            GetRfid1 = srcLbRFID1.Text
                            GetRfid2 = srcLbRFID2.Text
                            FLagRfid1 = False
                            FLagRfid2 = False
                            wStep = 2
                        End If

                    Else

                        If srcLbRFID1.Text.Length >= 16 Then
                            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
                            GetRfid1 = srcLbRFID1.Text
                            FLagRfid1 = False
                            FLagRfid2 = False
                            wStep = 2
                        End If

                    End If


                ElseIf wStep = 1.11 Then

                    srcLbPartID.Text = "0"
                    srcLbTotalDec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    srcLbTotalDec.Text = "RFID READ ERROR"
                    WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 5, True)
                    wStep = 5.1

                ElseIf wStep = 2 Then '

                    If LineType = "START" Then
                        wStep = 2.1
                    ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then
                        wStep = 2.7
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 2.1 Then

                    wStep = 2.2
                    LoadPartSelect(2.3)

                ElseIf wStep = 2.11 Then
                    ' 시나리오 대기 - 3초(30틱)마다 재조회
                    scenarioWaitCount = scenarioWaitCount + 1
                    If scenarioWaitCount >= 30 Then
                        scenarioWaitCount = 0
                        LoadPartSelect(2.3)
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 2.3 Then

                    Try
                        srcLbPartNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(StrPart)
                        WriteLog("Load Select Part - " & StrPart, "LOG")
                        CreateSerial(2.4)
                    Catch ex As Exception
                    End Try

                ElseIf wStep = 2.4 Then

                    SavePallet_OP10(GetRfid1, GetRfid2, srcLbSerialNo.Text, 2.5)

                ElseIf wStep = 2.5 Then

                    Appendlog("Make Serial - " & srcLbSerialNo.Text)
                    wStep = 2.6

                ElseIf wStep = 2.6 Then

                    wStep = 3

                ElseIf wStep = 2.7 Then 'LINE

                    wStep = 2.71
                    LoadPallet(GetRfid1, GetRfid2)

                ElseIf wStep = 2.8 Then 'Paellet Load Success

                    Appendlog("Pallet Load Success")
                    srcLbPartNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Mid(srcLbSerialNo.Text, 16, Len(srcLbSerialNo.Text) - 16 + 1))
                    wStep = 3

                ElseIf wStep = 2.81 Then 'Pallet Load Fail

                    srcLbPartID.Text = "0"
                    srcLbTotalDec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    srcLbTotalDec.Text = "RFID NG"
                    WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 5, True)
                    wStep = 5.1

                ElseIf wStep = 3 Then 'Part Loading Completed

                    Appendlog("Send RFID Recv ON")
                    WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 1, True)
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, Mid(srcLbPartNo.Text, 1, 11))
                    wStep = 4

                ElseIf wStep = 4 Then

                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, Mid(srcLbPartNo.Text, 1, 11))
                    LoadPartInfo(4.2)

                ElseIf wStep = 4.2 Then

                    If FlagWorkStandard = True Then FrmWorkStandard.LoadPicture(WorkStandardImagePath)
                    WriteLog("Load Part Information", "LOG")
                    wStep = 4.3

                ElseIf wStep = 4.3 Then

                    If OptionPosition1 = "LH" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 2, True)
                    ElseIf OptionPosition1 = "RH" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 3, True)
                    End If
                    If OptionPosition2 = "LHD" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 4, True)
                    ElseIf OptionPosition2 = "RHD" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 5, True)
                    End If
                    If tmpType = "SWING" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 0, True)
                    ElseIf tmpType = "COACH" Then
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1, 1, True)
                    End If

                    wStep = 5

                ElseIf wStep = 5 Then 'PLC 로 신호 전송 4004 번지

                    If srcLbPartID.Text = "0" Then '아이디가 0 이면 그냥 패스 ?
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 5, True)
                        wStep = 5.1
                    Else '외에는 작업해라
                        WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 1, True)
                        wStep = 5.2
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 5.1 Then '패스 루틴 ? 

                    wStep = 0

                ElseIf wStep = 5.2 Then '전송 확인

                    If IoInputBit(PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 1) = True Then
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        wStep = 5
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

                    wStep = 10

                ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

                    wStep = 10.1
                    LoadWorkInfo(srcLbPartID.Text)

                ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

                    ToolEnabled()
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 100 Then

                    FocusingGrid(SeqCount)
                    If SeqCount >= SeqTotal Then
                        wStep = 1000
                    Else
                        If SeqCount <> 0 Then
                            WriteLog("Work Seq" & CStr(SeqCount - 1) & vbTab & tmpSeqWorkInfo(SeqCount - 1) & vbTab & CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount - 1).Cells(4).Value) & vbTab & CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount - 1).Cells(5).Value), "LOG")
                        End If
                        If tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "QUERY" Then
                            wStep = 700
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "SCAN" Then
                            wStep = 110
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "SCAN_VER" Then
                            wStep = 115
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "MESSAGE" Then
                            wStep = 120
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "BARCODE" Then
                            wStep = 130
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "SCAN-PRINT" Then
                            wStep = 140
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "AIR TOOL" Then
                            ioToolStep = 0
                            wStep = 150
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "DELAY" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 160
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "CHECK" Then
                            wStep = 170
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "PARTCHECK" Then
                            wStep = 175
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "IOCHECK" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 180
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains("TOOL1") Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains("TOOL2") Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains("TOOL3") Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount).Contains("TOOL4") Then
                            wStep = 200
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "TOOL1" Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "TOOL2" Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "TOOL3" Or tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "TOOL4" Then
                            wStep = 200
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "RESIST" Then
                            wStep = 300
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "STAGECHECK" Then
                            wStep = 400
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "TEST" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 510
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "RS232" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 540
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "PALLET INIT" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 550
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "PALLET SAVE" Then
                            wStep = 555
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "LASER" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 600
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "LASER_END" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 610
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "IGNORE SEQ" Then
                            TmrCount = 0
                            wStep = 900
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "CAN-FD" Then
                            CanType = "CAN-FD"
                            wStep = 800
                        ElseIf tmpSeqType(SeqCount) = "CAN-FD-FC" Then
                            CanType = "CAN-FD-FC"
                            wStep = 810
                        End If
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 800 Then

                    Dim splittmp() As String
                    splittmp = Split(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount), "/")
                    CanMessage = splittmp(0)
                    CanTarget = splittmp(1)
                    SerialCan.WriteLine(CanMessage)
                    sw.Start()
                    wStep = 801

                ElseIf wStep = 801 Then

                    If Val(sw.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds) > 1 Then
                        sw.Stop()
                        wStep = 800
                    End If

                    If CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(5).Value) = "OK" Then
                        wStep = 802
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 802 Then

                    sw.Stop()
                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 810 Then

                    Dim splittmp() As String
                    splittmp = Split(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount), "/")
                    CanMessage = splittmp(0)
                    CanTarget = splittmp(1)
                    SerialCan.WriteLine(CanMessage)
                    sw.Start()
                    wStep = 811

                ElseIf wStep = 811 Then

                    If Val(sw.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds) > 1000 Then
                        sw.Stop()
                        wStep = 810
                    End If

                    'ElseIf wStep = 812 Then

                ElseIf wStep = 812 Then '플로우 컨트롤

                    SerialCan.WriteLine("707_8_30 00 00 00 00 00 00 00")
                    sw.Start()
                    wStep = 813

                ElseIf wStep = 813 Then

                    If Val(sw.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds) > 1000 Then
                        sw.Stop()
                        wStep = 810
                    End If
                    If CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(5).Value) = "OK" Then
                        wStep = 814
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 814 Then

                    sw.Stop()
                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 802 Then

                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 110 Then 'Scan

                    If CheckIO() = True Then wStep = 110.1

                ElseIf wStep = 110.1 Then

                    Dim TmpstrScan As String = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                    Dim splitScan() As String
                    splitScan = Split(TmpstrScan, "/")

                    If splitScan.Length = 1 Then

                        'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        wStep = 111

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 2 Then

                        ScanMode = "NORMAL"
                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True Then

                            Dim scantmp As String = ""
                            Appendlog($"[2]SVR/" & NullCheck(LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1))))
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1)))
                            scantmp = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)

                            If scantmp.Length = 10 Then
                                scanTarget2 = scantmp
                                scanTarget1 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & "-" & Mid(scantmp, 6, 5)
                            ElseIf scantmp.Length = 11 Then
                                scanTarget2 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & Mid(scantmp, 7, 5)
                                scanTarget1 = scantmp
                                scanTarget3 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & " " & Mid(scantmp, 7, 5)
                            ElseIf scantmp.Length > 11 Then
                                scanTarget2 = scantmp
                                scanTarget1 = scantmp
                                scanTarget3 = scantmp
                            End If

                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget1:{scanTarget1.ToString}")
                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget2:{scanTarget2.ToString}")
                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget3:{scanTarget3.ToString}")

                            'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)

                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount).Length < 2 Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                HideScanTarget()
                                wStep = 112
                            Else
                                'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                ShowScanTarget(scanTarget1)
                                wStep = 111
                            End If
                            'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount))

                        Else

                            ScanMode = "VER"
                            'splitScan(0) / splitScan(1)

                        End If

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 3 Then


                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True Then

                            Dim scantmp As String = ""
                            Appendlog($"[3]SVR/" & NullCheck(LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1))))
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1))) &
                                                     Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(srcLbSerialNo.Text, 3)
                            scantmp = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)

                            If scantmp.Length = 10 Then
                                scanTarget1 = scantmp
                                scanTarget2 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & "-" & Mid(scantmp, 6, 5)
                            ElseIf scantmp.Length = 11 Then
                                scanTarget1 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & Mid(scantmp, 7, 5)
                                scanTarget2 = scantmp
                                scanTarget3 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & " " & Mid(scantmp, 7, 5)
                            ElseIf scantmp.Length = 14 Then
                                scanTarget1 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & Mid(scantmp, 7, 8)
                                scanTarget2 = scantmp
                                scanTarget3 = Mid(scantmp, 1, 5) & " " & Mid(scantmp, 7, 8)
                            End If

                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget1:{scanTarget1.ToString}")
                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget2:{scanTarget2.ToString}")
                            Appendlog($"ScanTarget3:{scanTarget3.ToString}")

                            'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)

                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount).Length < 2 Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                HideScanTarget()
                                wStep = 112
                            Else
                                'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                ShowScanTarget(scanTarget1)
                                wStep = 111
                            End If
                            'Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount))
                        End If

                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 111 Then

                    If CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(5).Value) = "OK" Then
                        Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount))
                        HideScanTarget() ' 스캔 완료 시 타겟 표시 숨김
                        wStep = 112
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 112 Then

                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 115 Then 'Scan_VER

                    If CheckIO() = True Then wStep = 115.1

                ElseIf wStep = 115.1 Then

                    Dim TmpstrScan As String = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                    Dim splitScan() As String
                    splitScan = Split(TmpstrScan, "/")

                    If splitScan.Length = 1 Then

                        Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        wStep = 116

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 2 Then

                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True Then
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1))
                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = "0" Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                wStep = 117
                            Else
                                Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                wStep = 116
                            End If
                            Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        End If

                    ElseIf splitScan.Length = 3 Then

                        If TmpstrScan.Contains("SVR/") = True And TmpstrScan.Contains("COLOR") = True Then
                            tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = LoadSvrTarget(srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11), splitScan(1)) &
                                                     Microsoft.VisualBasic.Right(srcLbSerialNo.Text, 3)
                            If tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount) = "0" Then
                                DisplayGrid("NA", "OK", SeqCount)
                                wStep = 117
                            Else
                                Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                                wStep = 116
                            End If
                            Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)
                        End If

                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 116 Then

                    If CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(5).Value) = "OK" Then
                        wStep = 117
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 117 Then

                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 120 Then 'Message

                    If CheckIO() = True Then wStep = 121

                ElseIf wStep = 121 Then

                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    SetIO()
                    DisplayGridMSG("", "", SeqCount)
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 130 Then 'Barcode

                    If CheckIO() = True Then
                        FlagNG = False
                        wStep = 131
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 131 Then

                    For i = 0 To SeqCount - 1
                        If CStr(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(5).Value) = "NG" Then
                            FlagNG = True
                        End If
                    Next
                    If FlagNG = False Then
                        BarcodePrint(srcLbPartNo.Text, srcLbPartName.Text, srcLbSerialNo.Text)
                        DisplayGrid("", "OK", SeqCount)
                    ElseIf FlagNG = True Then
                        BarcodePrintNG(srcLbPartNo.Text, srcLbPartName.Text, srcLbSerialNo.Text)
                        DisplayGrid("", "NG", SeqCount)
                    End If
                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 140 Then 'Scan-Print

                    If CheckIO() = True Then wStep = 141

                ElseIf wStep = 141 Then

                    If CStr(Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(5).Value) = "OK" Then
                        wStep = 142
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 142 Then

                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 150 Then

                    ioToolStep = 0
                    AirToolCount = 0
                    AIrToolTarget = CInt(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount))
                    Appendlog($"Screw Target : {AIrToolTarget.ToString}")
                    wStep = 151

                ElseIf wStep = 151 Then

                    Dim j As Integer = 0

                    If ioToolStep = 0 Then
                        If CheckIO() = False Then
                            Appendlog($"IoNextStep-1")
                            ioToolStep = 1
                        End If
                    ElseIf ioToolStep = 1 Then
                        If CheckIO() = True Then
                            Appendlog($"Screw Signal On")
                            ioToolStep = 2
                        End If
                    ElseIf ioToolStep = 2 Then
                        If CheckIO() = False Then
                            Appendlog($"IoNextStep-3")
                            ioToolStep = 3
                        End If
                    ElseIf ioToolStep = 3 Then
                        If AirToolCount < AIrToolTarget Then
                            AirToolCount = AirToolCount + 1
                            Appendlog($"AddCound")
                            DingDOng()
                        End If
                        ioToolStep = 0
                    End If

                    Grid1.Rows(SeqCount).Cells(4).Value = AirToolCount.ToString & " / " & AIrToolTarget.ToString
                    Dim tMPstr As String = AirToolCount.ToString & "/" & AIrToolTarget.ToString

                    If AirToolCount >= AIrToolTarget Then
                        DisplayGrid(tMPstr, "OK", SeqCount)
                        tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                        SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                        wStep = 100
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 152 Then

                    SetIO()
                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    DingDOng()
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 160 Then 'DELAY

                    If CheckIO() = True Then
                        wStep = 161
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 161 Then

                    TmrCount = TmrCount + 0.2
                    If TmrCount >= CDbl(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount)) Then
                        wStep = 162
                    End If

                ElseIf wStep = 162 Then

                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    SetIO()
                    DisplayGrid("", "OK", SeqCount)
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 100

                ElseIf wStep = 170 Then 'CHECK

                    If CheckIO() = True Then wStep = 171

                ElseIf wStep = 171 Then

                    LoadPicture(srcPicMain, tmpMainImagePath(SeqCount))
                    SetIO()
                    tmpSeqTime(SeqCount) = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
                    SeqCount = SeqCount + 1
                    wStep = 172

                ElseIf wStep = 172 Then 'IOCHECK

                    Dim TmpSPlit() As String = Split(tmpSeqTarget(SeqCount), "/")
                    If TmpSPlit.Count = 3 Then
                        CheckMsg = TmpSPlit(0)
                        CheckOK = CInt(TmpSPlit(1))
                        CheckNg = CInt(TmpSPlit(2))
                    End If
                    wStep = 176

                ElseIf wStep = 176 Then '

                    If IoInput(CheckOK) = 1 Then
                        wStep = 177
                    ElseIf IoInput(CheckNg) = 1 Then

    Private Function CheckNum(str As String) As Double
        Dim TmpNum As Double = 0
        If str = "L1_1" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser1(1)
        ElseIf str = "L1_2" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser1(2)
        ElseIf str = "L1_3" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser1(3)
        ElseIf str = "L1_4" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser1(4)
        ElseIf str = "L2_1" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser2(1)
        ElseIf str = "L2_2" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser2(2)
        ElseIf str = "L2_3" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser2(3)
        ElseIf str = "L2_4" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser2(4)
        ElseIf str = "L3_1" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser3(1)
        ElseIf str = "L3_2" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser3(2)
        ElseIf str = "L3_3" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser3(3)
        ElseIf str = "L3_4" Then
            TmpNum = ValueLaser3(4)
        Else
            Try
                TmpNum = CDbl(str)
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If
        Return TmpNum
    End Function

    Private gToolData As Double
    Private Function CalcString(getStr As String) As String

        Dim str As String = Replace(getStr, " ", "")
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim StackNum As New Stack
        Dim StackOperator As New Stack
        Dim TmpVal As Double = 0
        Dim tmpOperator As String = ""
        Dim tmpNum As Double = 0
        Dim StartPos As Integer = 1
        Dim ChCount As Integer = 0
        Try
            For i = 1 To Len(str)
                If Mid(str, i, 1) = "+" Then
                    StackOperator.Push("+")
                    StackNum.Push(CheckNum(Mid(str, StartPos, i - StartPos)))
                    StartPos = i + 1
                ElseIf Mid(str, i, 1) = "-" Then
                    StackOperator.Push("-")
                    StackNum.Push(CheckNum(Mid(str, StartPos, i - StartPos)))
                    StartPos = i + 1
                ElseIf Mid(str, i, 1) = "=" Then
                    StackOperator.Push("=")
                    StackNum.Push(CheckNum(Mid(str, StartPos, i - StartPos)))
                End If
            Next
            Do Until StackNum.Count = 0
                If StackOperator.Count <> 0 Then tmpOperator = StackOperator.Pop
                If tmpOperator = "=" Then
                ElseIf tmpOperator = "+" Then
                    tmpNum = CDbl(StackNum.Pop)
                    TmpVal = TmpVal + tmpNum
                    tmpOperator = ""
                ElseIf tmpOperator = "-" Then
                    tmpNum = CDbl(StackNum.Pop)
                    TmpVal = TmpVal - tmpNum
                    tmpOperator = ""
                ElseIf tmpOperator = "" Then
                    tmpNum = CDbl(StackNum.Pop)
                    TmpVal = TmpVal + tmpNum
                End If
            Loop
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return TmpVal

    End Function

#Region "IO Thread"

    Private Sub ReadPlc(ByVal strStartADdress As String, ByVal strDataNumberHex As String)
        SerialIO.Write(Chr(5) & "00" & "R" & "SB" & "07" & strStartADdress & strDataNumberHex & Chr(4))
        'Chr(5) & "00" & "R" & "SB" & "07" & "%DW4000" & "20"ㅇ & Chr(4)
        'ReadPlc("%DW4000", "20")

    End Sub

    Sub DoWrite1()
        'DoutString ' 64 자리
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        For i = 0 To 31
            If Mid(DoutString, i + 1, 1) = "1" Then
                tmp = tmp & "0" & "0" & "0" & "1"
            Else
                tmp = tmp & "0" & "0" & "0" & "0"
            End If
        Next
        SerialIO.Write(Chr(5) & "00" & "W" & "SB" & "07" & "%DW5000" & "20" & tmp & Chr(4))
    End Sub

    Sub DoWrite2()
        'DoutString ' 64 자리
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        For i = 32 To 63
            If Mid(DoutString, i + 1, 1) = "1" Then
                tmp = tmp & "0" & "0" & "0" & "1"
            Else
                tmp = tmp & "0" & "0" & "0" & "0"
            End If
        Next
        SerialIO.Write(Chr(5) & "00" & "W" & "SB" & "07" & "%DW5032" & "20" & tmp & Chr(4))
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskLsPlc()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim i As Integer

        Do While SerialIO.IsOpen = True

            If PlcREadSTep = 0 Then
                ReadPlc("%DW4000", "20") 'DW4000 번지 32개 요청
                PlcREadSTep = 1
            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 1 Then 'StanbyDataRead

            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 2 Then
                ReadPlc("%DW4032", "20") 'DW4032 번지 32개 요청
                PlcREadSTep = 3
            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 3 Then 'StanbyDataRead

            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 4 Then
                ReadPlc("%DW5000", "20") 'DW5000 번지 32개 요청
                PlcREadSTep = 5
            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 5 Then 'StanbyDataRead

            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 6 Then
                ReadPlc("%DW5032", "20") 'DW5032 번지 32개 요청
                PlcREadSTep = 7
            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 7 Then 'StanbyDataRead

            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 8 Then 'DoWrite
                DoWrite1()
                PlcREadSTep = 9

            ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 10 Then
                DoWrite2()
                PlcREadSTep = 11
            End If

            Try
                If SerialIO.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                    Incoming1 = SerialIO.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then
                        If PlcREadSTep = 1 Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(4000 + i) = CInt(Mid(PlcSTring, (4 * i) + 11, 4))
                            Next
                            PlcREadSTep = 2
                        ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 3 Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(4032 + i) = CInt(Mid(PlcSTring, (4 * i) + 11, 4))
                            Next
                            PlcREadSTep = 4
                        ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 5 Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(5000 + i) = CInt(Mid(PlcSTring, (4 * i) + 11, 4))
                            Next
                            PlcREadSTep = 6
                        ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 7 Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(5032 + i) = CInt(Mid(PlcSTring, (4 * i) + 11, 4))
                            Next
                            PlcREadSTep = 8
                        ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 9 Then
                            PlcREadSTep = 10
                        ElseIf PlcREadSTep = 11 Then
                            PlcREadSTep = 0
                        End If
                        PlcSTring = ""
                        SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                    Else
                        PlcSTring = PlcSTring & Chr(Incoming1)
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                Incoming1 = ""
                PlcSTring = ""
                PlcREadSTep = 0
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 15
                                IoInput(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    ElseIf RecvString.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub VITUALKEYBOARDToolStripMenuItem_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles VITUALKEYBOARDToolStripMenuItem.Click
        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then

                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)

        Else

        If MakerTool1 = "ATLAS ETERNET" Then
            If Tool1ConnectionStep = 0 Then '
                ConnectTool1()
            ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 1 Then 'Connected
                RequestTool1Data("0020" & "0001" & "003" & "0" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(0))
                Tool1ConnectionStep = 1.1
            ElseIf Tool1ConnectionStep = 2 Then 'Connected

                SerialTool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "002099990010" & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr(20) & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

    Private Function CalculateModbusCRC(data() As Byte, length As Integer) As UShort
        Dim crc As UShort = &HFFFF

        For i As Integer = 0 To length - 1
            crc = crc Xor data(i)
            For j As Integer = 0 To 7
                If (crc And 1) <> 0 Then
                    crc = (crc >> 1) Xor &HA001
                Else
                    crc >>= 1
                End If
            Next
        Next

        Return crc
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Auto font sizing - adjusts font to fit cell bounds
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub Grid1_CellPainting(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellPaintingEventArgs)
        Try
            If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
            If Grid1.Columns.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim colName As String = Grid1.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
            ' Skip image and hidden columns
            If colName = "ColImage" OrElse colName = "ColHidden" Then Return

            Dim cellValue As String = If(e.Value, "").ToString()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cellValue) Then Return

            ' Paint background first
            e.PaintBackground(e.ClipBounds, True)

            ' Cell text area with padding
            Dim cellRect As Rectangle = e.CellBounds
            Dim textRect As New Rectangle(cellRect.X + 4, cellRect.Y + 2, cellRect.Width - 8, cellRect.Height - 4)

            ' Calculate optimal font size
            Dim fontFamily As String = "Arial Narrow"
            Dim fontSize As Single = CalculateFontSize(cellValue, textRect, fontFamily, e.Graphics)

            ' Draw text
            Using font As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim sf As New StringFormat()
                sf.Alignment = StringAlignment.Center
                sf.LineAlignment = StringAlignment.Center

                Dim textColor As Color = If(e.CellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Empty, Color.Black, e.CellStyle.ForeColor)
                Using brush As New SolidBrush(textColor)
                    e.Graphics.DrawString(cellValue, font, brush, textRect, sf)
                End Using
            End Using

            e.Handled = True
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Binary search to find largest font size that fits within rectangle
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function CalculateFontSize(text As String, rect As Rectangle, fontFamily As String, g As Graphics) As Single
        Dim minSize As Single = 12
        Dim maxSize As Single = 50
        Dim fontSize As Single = maxSize

        While maxSize - minSize > 1
            fontSize = (minSize + maxSize) / 2
            Using testFont As New Font(fontFamily, fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                Dim textSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(text, testFont)
                If textSize.Width <= rect.Width AndAlso textSize.Height <= rect.Height Then
                    minSize = fontSize
                Else
                    maxSize = fontSize
                End If
            End Using
        End While

        Return minSize
    End Function

#Region "Barcode"

    Public Sub BarcodePrint(ByVal strPartno As String, ByVal strPArtName As String, ByVal strSerialNo As String)

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        Dim Tmp As String
        Dim TqString As String = ""
        Dim TmpSize As String

        If LineType = "END" Then

            Tmp =
                "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS &
                "V" & "2812" & GS &
                "P" & Replace(strPartno, "-", "") & GS &
                "S" & "" & GS &
                "E" & "" & GS &
                "T" & Mid(strSerialNo, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1JGFB" & "A" & Mid(strSerialNo, 9, 7) & GS &
                "M" & "" & GS &
                "C" & "" & GS &
                RS & EOT

            LoadBarcodeData()

            Try
                TmpSize = CStr(CInt(BARCODE_SIZE1) + CInt(BarcodeSizeOffSet))
            Catch ex As Exception
                TmpSize = CStr(CInt(BARCODE_SIZE1))
            End Try

            Appendlog($"출하바코드:{Tmp}")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & BARCODE_X & "," & BARCODE_Y & "^BY5^BXN," & TmpSize & "," & BARCODE_SIZE2 & ",,,,^FH^FD" & Tmp & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & SERIALNO_X & "," & SERIALNO_Y & "^A0N," & SERIALNO_H & "," & SERIALNO_W & "^FD" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNO_X & "," & PARTNO_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNO_H & "," & PARTNO_W & "^FD" & strPartno & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNAME_X & "," & PARTNAME_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNAME_H & "," & PARTNAME_W & "^FD" & strPArtName & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & COMPANY_X & "," & COMPANY_Y & "^A0N," & COMPANY_H & "," & COMPANY_W & "^FD" & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm") & " " & Mid(strSerialNo, 9, 7) & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & LETTER_X & "," & LETTER_Y & "^A0N," & LETTER_H & "," & LETTER_W & "^FD" & TmpPartCode & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & TQ_X & "," & TQ_Y & "^A0N," & TQ_H & "," & TQ_W & "^FD" & TqString & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XZ")

        ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then

            LoadBarcodeData()
            Tmp = strSerialNo
            TmpBarcodeData = Tmp
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & BARCODE_X & "," & BARCODE_Y & "^BQN," & BARCODE_SIZE1 & "," & BARCODE_SIZE2 & "^FDMM,A" & Tmp & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & SERIALNO_X & "," & SERIALNO_Y & "^A0N," & SERIALNO_H & "," & SERIALNO_W & "^FD" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNO_X & "," & PARTNO_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNO_H & "," & PARTNO_W & "^FD" & strPartno & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & PARTNAME_X & "," & PARTNAME_Y & "^A0N," & PARTNAME_H & "," & PARTNAME_W & "^FD" & strPArtName & "^FS")
            SerialPrinter.Write("^XZ")

        End If

    End Sub

    Private S10Dec As String
    Private S20Dec As String
    Private S30Dec As String
    Private S40Dec As String
    Private S50Dec As String
    Private S60Dec As String
    Private STestDec As String

    Private Function Dec2Str(Str) As String

        Dim Tmp As String
        Try
            Tmp = Trim(Str)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Tmp = "NG"
        End Try
        Return Tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub BarcodePrintNG(ByVal strPartno As String, ByVal strPArtName As String, ByVal strSerialNo As String)

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim TestStr(14) As String
        Dim TestVal(14) As String
        Dim TestTitle(14) As String
        Dim NgString1 As String = ""
        Dim NgString2 As String = ""
        Dim NgString3 As String = ""
        Dim NgString4 As String = ""
        Dim NGCount As Integer = 0

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE SerialNo = '" & strSerialNo & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            S10Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP10_Decision").Value)
            S20Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP20_Decision").Value)
            S30Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP30_Decision").Value)
            S40Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP40_Decision").Value)
            S50Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OP50_Decision").Value)
            S60Dec = Dec2Str(Rs.Fields("OPTest_Total_Decision").Value)

            TestStr(0) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(1) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(2) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdSpeedDec"
            TestStr(3) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAngleDec"
            TestStr(4) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(5) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(6) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdSpeedDec"
            TestStr(7) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAngleDec"
            TestStr(8) = "OpTest_Recl_EndAngleDec"
            TestStr(9) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(10) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(11) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdAmpDec"
            TestStr(12) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdNoiseDec"
            TestStr(13) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdForceDec"
            TestStr(14) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdForceDec"

            TestVal(0) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAmp"
            TestVal(1) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdNoise"
            TestVal(2) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdSpeed"
            TestVal(3) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdAngle"
            TestVal(4) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAmp"
            TestVal(5) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdNoise"
            TestVal(6) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdSpeed"
            TestVal(7) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdAngle"
            TestVal(8) = "OpTest_Recl_EndAngle"
            TestVal(9) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdAmp"
            TestVal(10) = "OpTest_Lsupt_FwdNoise"
            TestVal(11) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdAmp"
            TestVal(12) = "OpTest_Lsupt_BwdNoise"
            TestVal(13) = "OpTest_Recl_FwdForce"
            TestVal(14) = "OpTest_Recl_BwdForce"

            TestTitle(0) = "R FWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(1) = "R FWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(2) = "R FWD SPEED NG:"
            TestTitle(3) = "R FWD ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(4) = "R BWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(5) = "R BWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(6) = "R BWD SPEED NG:"
            TestTitle(7) = "R BWD ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(8) = "R END ANGLE NG:"
            TestTitle(9) = "L FWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(10) = "L FWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(11) = "L BWD AMP NG:"
            TestTitle(12) = "L BWD NOISE NG:"
            TestTitle(13) = "R FWD FORCE NG:"
            TestTitle(14) = "R BWD FORCE NG:"

            For i = 0 To 14
                Try
                    If Rs.Fields(TestStr(i)).Value = "NG" Then
                        NGCount = NGCount + 1
                        If NGCount <= 2 Then
                            NgString1 = NgString1 & " / " & TestTitle(i) & Rs.Fields(TestVal(i)).Value
                        ElseIf NGCount <= 4 And NGCount > 2 Then
                            NgString2 = NgString2 & " / " & TestTitle(i) & Rs.Fields(TestVal(i)).Value
                        ElseIf NGCount <= 6 And NGCount > 4 Then
                            NgString3 = NgString3 & " / " & TestTitle(i) & Rs.Fields(TestVal(i)).Value
                        ElseIf NGCount <= 8 And NGCount > 6 Then
                            NgString4 = NgString4 & " / " & TestTitle(i) & Rs.Fields(TestVal(i)).Value
                        End If
                    End If
                Catch ex As Exception
                End Try
            Next

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()

        SerialPrinter.Write("^XA")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "40" & "," & "40" & "^BQN," & "8" & "," & "7" & "^FDMM,A" & "NG" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "250" & "," & "50" & "^A0N," & "70" & "," & "40" & "^FD" & strSerialNo & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "800" & "," & "50" & "^A0N," & "120" & "," & "120" & "^FD" & "NG" & "^FS")

        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "250" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S10 : " & S10Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "355" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S20 : " & S20Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "460" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S30 : " & S30Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "565" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S40 : " & S40Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "670" & "," & "130" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "S50 : " & S50Dec & "^FS")
        SerialPrinter.Write("^FO" & "250" & "," & "190" & "^A0N," & "50" & "," & "25" & "^FD" & "NOISE TEST : " & S60Dec & "^FS")

    Private Sub SerialResist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialResist.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim tmpdata As Double
        Dim SplitTmp() As String

        Incoming = SerialResist.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialResist.DiscardInBuffer()

        Try
            ' 2.4400E+00
            If ResistSEnd1 = True Then
                If tmp.Contains("E+00") = True Then
                    SplitTmp = Split(tmp, "E")
                    tmpdata = CDbl(SplitTmp(0))
                ElseIf tmp.Contains("E+30") = True Then
                    tmpdata = -10
                End If
                ResistData1 = tmpdata
            End If
            ResistSEnd1 = False
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmpdata = 0
            ResistSEnd1 = False
        End Try
        ResistSEnd1 = False

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialResist2_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialResist2.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim tmpdata As Double
        Dim SplitTmp() As String

        Incoming = SerialResist2.ReadLine()
        tmp = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialResist2.DiscardInBuffer()

        Try
            ' 2.4400E+00
            If ResistSEnd2 = True Then
                If tmp.Contains("E+00") = True Then
                    SplitTmp = Split(tmp, "E")
                    tmpdata = CDbl(SplitTmp(0))
                ElseIf tmp.Contains("E+30") = True Then
                    tmpdata = -10
                End If
                ResistData2 = tmpdata
            End If
            ResistSEnd2 = False
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmpdata = 0
            ResistSEnd2 = False
        End Try
        ResistSEnd2 = False

    End Sub

    ' "4001.0" 또는 "D4001.0" 같은 문자열을 파싱해 워드주소/비트인덱스/디바이스를 뽑는다.
    Private Function TryParseAddressWithBit(ByVal input As String,
                                        ByRef device As String,
                                        ByRef wordAddress As Integer,
                                        ByRef bitIndex As Integer) As Boolean
        device = Nothing
        wordAddress = 0
        bitIndex = 0

        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(input) Then Return False

        Dim rx As New Regex("^\s*(?:(?<dev>[A-Za-z]+)\s*)?(?<addr>\d+)(?:\.(?<bit>\d{1,2}))?\s*$")
        Dim m = rx.Match(input)
        If Not m.Success Then Return False

        Dim addrStr As String = m.Groups("addr").Value
        Dim bitStr As String = If(m.Groups("bit").Success, m.Groups("bit").Value, "0")
        Dim devStr As String = If(m.Groups("dev").Success, m.Groups("dev").Value, Nothing)

        If Not Integer.TryParse(addrStr, wordAddress) Then Return False
        If Not Integer.TryParse(bitStr, bitIndex) Then Return False
        If bitIndex < 0 OrElse bitIndex > 15 Then Return False

        device = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(devStr), Nothing, devStr.ToUpperInvariant())
        Return True
    End Function

    ' 문자열 주소("4001.0" 또는 "D4001.0")로 비트 쓰기
    ' defaultDevice: 문자열에 디바이스 문자가 없을 때 사용할 기본 디바이스(예: "D")
    Private Sub WritePlcBitByString(ByVal defaultDevice As String,
                                ByVal addressWithBit As String,
                                ByVal setOn As Boolean)
        Dim dev As String = Nothing
        Dim word As Integer
        Dim bit As Integer

        If Not TryParseAddressWithBit(addressWithBit, dev, word, bit) Then
            Appendlog($"WritePlcBitByString: 주소 파싱 실패 → '{addressWithBit}'")
            Exit Sub
        End If

        ' 문자열에 디바이스가 있으면 그걸 쓰고, 없으면 기본 디바이스 사용
        Dim useDevice As String = If(String.IsNullOrEmpty(dev), defaultDevice, dev)

        ' 기존에 만들어 둔 단일 비트 쓰기 함수 호출
        WritePlcBit(useDevice, word, bit, setOn)
    End Sub

    Private Sub SetIO()

        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort1(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort1ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort1(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort1ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort1(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort2(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort2ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort2(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort2ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort2(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort3(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort3ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort3(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort3ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort3(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqOutPort4(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqOutPort4ONOFF(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort4(SeqCount), True)
            ElseIf SeqOutPort4ONOFF(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                WritePlcBitByString("D", SeqOutPort4(SeqCount), False)
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FocusingGrid(ByVal WorkNum As Integer)

        Try
            ' WorkNum is 1-based (from FlexCell), convert to 0-based
            Dim dataRow As Integer = WorkNum - 1
            If dataRow < 0 OrElse dataRow >= Grid1.Rows.Count Then Exit Sub

            Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.ForeColor = Color.White
            Grid1.Rows(dataRow).Cells(1).Style.BackColor = Color.Black

            ' Scroll to show current + next 2 rows
            Dim scrollRow As Integer = Math.Min(dataRow + 2, Grid1.Rows.Count - 1)
            If scrollRow >= 0 Then Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = Math.Max(0, scrollRow - 2)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveSQLDB()
        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tMP As String = ""

        Try
            If LineType = "START" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "INSERT INTO " & ServerTableName & " (PartNo,PartName,SerialNo," & ServerColumnName & "_Date," & ServerColumnName & "_StartTime," & ServerColumnName & "_EndTime," & ServerColumnName & "_Decision,"
                For i = 0 To Grid1.Rows.Count - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i) = True Then
                        strSQL = strSQL & "" & tmpSeqColumnName(i) & ","
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"
                strSQL = strSQL & " VALUES (" & "'" & srcLbPartNo.Text & "','" & srcLbPartName.Text & "','" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "','" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "','" & StartTime & "','" & EndTime & "','" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 0 To Grid1.Rows.Count - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i) = True Then
                        If tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & "'" & CStr(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(4).Value) & "',"
                        End If
                    End If
                Next
                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & ")"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")
                SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
                ConnectionCloseSQL()

            ElseIf LineType = "LINE" Then
                ConnectionOpenSQL()

                strSQL = "UPDATE " & ServerTableName & " SET " &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Date" & " = " & "'" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_StartTime" & " = " & "'" & StartTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_EndTime" & " = " & "'" & EndTime & "'," &
                     ServerColumnName & "_Decision" & " = " & "'" & srcLbTotalDec.Text & "',"
                For i = 0 To Grid1.Rows.Count - 1
                    If tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i) = True Then

                        If tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") Then
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i) & " = " & "'" & tmpSeqScanData(i) & "',"
                        Else
                            strSQL = strSQL & tmpSeqColumnName(i) & " = " & "'" & CStr(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(4).Value) & "',"
                        End If

                    End If
                Next

                tMP = Mid(strSQL, 1, Len(strSQL) - 1)
                strSQL = tMP & " "
                strSQL = strSQL & "WHERE SerialNo = '" & srcLbSerialNo.Text & "'"

                Appendlog($"쿼리[{strSQL}]")
                SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)
                ConnectionCloseSQL()
            End If

            wStep = 1002.2

        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("SaveSQLDB 오류 발생: " & ex.Message)
            Appendlog("스택트레이스: " & ex.StackTrace)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function SearchPart(ByVal strScanRead As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim strSql As String

        ConnectionOpenSQL()

        Try
            ' 검색 조건: OR 로 연결
            strSql = "HeadBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR FrameBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR MotorBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR LsuptBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR SabBarcode1 = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR SabBarcode2 = '" & strScanRead & "' " &
                 " OR HarnessBarcode = '" & strScanRead & "' "

            ' Recordset 옵션
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Dim Query As String = "SELECT TOP 1 * FROM Table_Main " &
                "WHERE (" & strSql & ") ORDER BY ID DESC"
            ' SQL 실행: ID 가장 큰 레코드만 1건 반환
            Rs.Open(Query, SqlConnect)

            Appendlog(Query)
            Appendlog($"RecordCount: {Rs.RecordCount}")

            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

                srcLbPartName.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
                srcLbPartNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value)
                srcLbSerialNo.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("SerialNo").Value)
                tmp = True
                Appendlog("가장 최근 ID 레코드 반환 성공")
            Else
                tmp = False
                Appendlog("검색 결과 없음")
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()

            Return tmp

        Catch ex As Exception

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            Appendlog("SearchPart 오류: " & ex.Message)
            Return False
        End Try

    End Function

    Private Sub LoadWorkInfo(ByVal strID As String)

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)
        i = 0

        If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
        Else
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF

                TmpFlagSeqIncludeBarcode(i) = Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value
                TmpFlagDuplicateCheck(i) = Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value
                tmpSeqType(i) = Rs.Fields("Type").Value
                tmpSeqTarget(i) = Rs.Fields("Target").Value
                tmpSeqWorkInfo(i) = Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value
                tmpSeqWorkInfoFontSize(i) = Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value
                tmpMainImagePath(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
                tmpNgImagePath(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
                tmpSubImagePath(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value)
                tmpSeqFlagServerSave(i) = Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value
                tmpSeqColumnName(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                SeqInPort1(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
                SeqInPort2(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)
                SeqInPort3(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                SeqInPort4(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)
                SeqInPort1State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
                SeqInPort2State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                SeqInPort3State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)
                SeqInPort4State(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value)
                SeqOutPort1(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value)
                SeqOutPort2(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)
                SeqOutPort3(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value)
                SeqOutPort4(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value)
                SeqOutPort1ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort2ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort3ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                SeqOutPort4ONOFF(i) = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)

                If tmpSeqType(i).Contains("TQ") = True Then
                    Grid1.Rows.Add("", CStr(i + 1), CStr(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value), Nothing, "", "")
                ElseIf tmpSeqType(i).Contains("SCAN") = True Then
                    Grid1.Rows.Add("", CStr(i + 1), CStr(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value), Nothing, "", "")
                Else
                    Grid1.Rows.Add("", CStr(i + 1), CStr(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value), Nothing, CStr(Rs.Fields("Target").Value), "")
                End If

                ' Image loading
                Try
                    Img(i) = New Bitmap(tmpSubImagePath(i))
                    Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(3).Value = Img(i)
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Img(i) = Nothing
                End Try
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        SeqTotal = Rs.RecordCount
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        wStep = 11

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPartInfo(NextStep As Double)

        wStep = wStep + 0.001
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE PartNO LIKE '%" & srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11) & "%'", SqlConnect)

        Appendlog("LoadPart-" & srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11).ToString & "-RecourdCount:" & Rs.RecordCount.ToString)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Appendlog("LoadWorkID-" & "WorkID_" & ServerColumnName & "-Value:" & Rs.Fields("WorkID_" & ServerColumnName).Value.ToString)
            srcLbPartID.Text = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("WorkID_" & ServerColumnName).Value)
            srcLbPartName.Text = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            Appendlog("LoadPartName")
            WorkStandardImagePath = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkStandard_" & ServerColumnName).Value)
            ' DB 경로가 없거나 파일이 없으면 로컬 Image_WorkStandard 폴더에서 찾기
            If WorkStandardImagePath = "" OrElse Not System.IO.File.Exists(WorkStandardImagePath) Then
                Dim partNo As String = srcLbPartNo.Text.Substring(0, 11)
                Dim localFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "Image_WorkStandard\"
                If System.IO.File.Exists(localFolder & partNo & ".png") Then
                    WorkStandardImagePath = localFolder & partNo & ".png"
                ElseIf System.IO.File.Exists(localFolder & partNo & ".jpg") Then
                    WorkStandardImagePath = localFolder & partNo & ".jpg"
                End If
            End If
            Appendlog("LoadImage:" & WorkStandardImagePath)
            OptionPosition1 = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("Pos1").Value)
            Appendlog("LoadPosition:" & OptionPosition1)
            OptionPosition2 = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("Pos2").Value)
            Appendlog("LoadPosition2:" & OptionPosition2)
            tmpType = RemoveAllWhiteSpace(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)
            Appendlog("Type:" & tmpType)
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseSQL()
        wStep = NextStep

    End Sub

    Private strSelectPart As String
    Private Sub LoadPartSelect(NextStep As Double)

        wStep = wStep + 0.01
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        ' IN_PROGRESS 상태의 시나리오에서 현재 순번에 해당하는 품번+색상코드 조회
        Rs.Open("SELECT d.PartNo + d.ColorCode AS SelectPartNo " &
                "FROM Table_Scenario s " &
                "INNER JOIN Table_Scenario_Detail d ON s.ScenarioID = d.ScenarioID AND s.CurrentSeq = d.Seq " &
                "WHERE s.Status = 'IN_PROGRESS'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            StrPart = Rs.Fields("SelectPartNo").Value
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            SelectSwap()
            scenarioWaitCount = 0
            wStep = NextStep
        Else
            ' 활성화된 시나리오 없음 - 대기 (타이머에서 재시도)
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            srcLbTotalDec.BackColor = Color.Black
            srcLbTotalDec.Text = "시나리오 대기"
            scenarioWaitCount = 0
            wStep = 2.11
        End If

    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 시나리오 진행상황 업데이트 - 완료수량 증가, 목표달성시 다음순번으로 이동
    ''' 첫 번째 공정(OP10)에서만 카운트 증가하도록 수정 (2025-12-19)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub UpdateScenarioProgress()
        ' 첫 번째 공정(OP10)에서만 시나리오 진행 업데이트 - 중복 카운트 방지
        If ServerColumnName <> "OP10" Then Exit Sub

        Try
            ConnectionOpenSQL()

            ' 현재 진행중인 시나리오의 상세 완료수량 +1 업데이트
            Dim strSQL As String = "UPDATE d SET d.CompletedQty = d.CompletedQty + 1 " &
                "FROM Table_Scenario_Detail d " &
                "INNER JOIN Table_Scenario s ON d.ScenarioID = s.ScenarioID AND d.Seq = s.CurrentSeq " &
                "WHERE s.Status = 'IN_PROGRESS'"
            SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)

            ' 목표수량 달성 여부 확인 및 다음 순번으로 이동
            strSQL = "DECLARE @ScenarioID INT, @CurrentSeq INT, @MaxSeq INT " &
                "SELECT @ScenarioID = s.ScenarioID, @CurrentSeq = s.CurrentSeq " &
                "FROM Table_Scenario s WHERE s.Status = 'IN_PROGRESS' " &
                "IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Table_Scenario_Detail WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq AND CompletedQty >= TargetQty) " &
                "BEGIN " &
                "   UPDATE Table_Scenario_Detail SET Status = 'COMPLETED', EndTime = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq " &
                "   SELECT @MaxSeq = MAX(Seq) FROM Table_Scenario_Detail WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "   IF @CurrentSeq < @MaxSeq " &
                "   BEGIN " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario SET CurrentSeq = CurrentSeq + 1, ModifyDate = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario_Detail SET Status = 'IN_PROGRESS', StartTime = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID AND Seq = @CurrentSeq + 1 " &
                "   END " &
                "   ELSE " &
                "   BEGIN " &
                "       UPDATE Table_Scenario SET Status = 'COMPLETED', ModifyDate = GETDATE() WHERE ScenarioID = @ScenarioID " &
                "   END " &
                "END"
            SqlConnect.Execute(strSQL)

            ConnectionCloseSQL()
            Appendlog("Scenario Progress Updated")
        Catch ex As Exception
            Appendlog("UpdateScenarioProgress Error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Function GetMaxMainRowNum() As Integer

        Dim tmpMaxNum As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID),WORKID", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                If tmpMaxNum < CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value) Then
                    tmpMaxNum = CInt(Rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
                End If
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        Return tmpMaxNum

    End Function
    Private Function ParseWord(ByVal input As String) As Integer
        Dim word As Integer = 0
        Dim bit As Integer = 0
        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
        If parts.Length = 2 Then
            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
        Else
            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
            bit = 0
        End If
        Return word
    End Function
    Private Function ParseBit(ByVal input As String) As Integer
        Dim word As Integer = 0
        Dim bit As Integer = 0
        Dim parts() As String = input.Split("."c)
        If parts.Length = 2 Then
            Integer.TryParse(parts(0), word)   ' "4001" → 4001
            Integer.TryParse(parts(1), bit)    ' "1"    → 1
        Else
            ' 점(.)이 없을 경우 비트는 0으로 처리
            Integer.TryParse(input, word)
            bit = 0
        End If
        Return bit
    End Function
    Private Function CheckIO() As Boolean
        Dim tmpIoCheck As Boolean = True
        Dim Word As Integer
        Dim Bit As Integer

        ' 포트1 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort1(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort1(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트2 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort2(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort2State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort2State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트3 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort3(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        ' 포트4 체크
        If Not String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(SeqInPort4(SeqCount)) Then
            Word = ParseWord(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))
            Bit = ParseBit(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))

            If SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = False Then tmpIoCheck = False
            ElseIf SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInputBit(Word, Bit) = True Then tmpIoCheck = False
            End If
        End If

        Return tmpIoCheck

    End Function

    Private Function CheckIO_Or()

        Dim tmpIoCheck As Boolean
        Dim tmpIoCheck1 As Boolean = True
        Dim tmpIoCheck2 As Boolean = True
        Dim tmpIoCheck3 As Boolean = True
        Dim tmpIoCheck4 As Boolean = True

        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort1(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqInPort1State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then

                Else
                    tmpIoCheck1 = False

        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort2(SeqCount)) = True Then

                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))) = 1 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck2 = False
                End If
            ElseIf SeqInPort2State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort2(SeqCount))) = 0 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck2 = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort3(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))) = 1 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck3 = False
                End If
            ElseIf SeqInPort3State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort3(SeqCount))) = 0 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck3 = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
        End If
        If IsNumeric(SeqInPort4(SeqCount)) = True Then
            If SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "ON" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))) = 1 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck4 = False
                End If
            ElseIf SeqInPort4State(SeqCount) = "OFF" Then
                If IoInput(CInt(SeqInPort4(SeqCount))) = 0 Then
                Else
                    tmpIoCheck4 = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
        End If

        If tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Or tmpIoCheck1 = True Then
            tmpIoCheck = True
        End If
        Return tmpIoCheck

    End Function
